example: It is very distressing to see your baby attached to tubes and monitors. 看到你的孩子插着管子，连着监控器，真是令人担忧。

translation: adj. 北的
example: Nahanni National Park Reserve in the Northwest Territories has more than 11, 500 square miles of wilderness that includes ice fields, mountains, alpine tundra, and boreal forest. 西北地区的纳翰尼国家公园保护区有超过11 500平方英里的荒原，包括冰原，高山，高山苔原，北方森林。

translation: adj. 背的, 脊的

translation: adj. 背叛的, 背信弃义的, 奸诈的, 叛逆的
example: a sly and treacherous woman 一个阴险狡诈的女人

translation: adj. 背信弃义的
example: Their feet will trample on the dead bodies of their perfidious aggressors. 他们将从背信弃义的侵略者的尸体上踏过。

translation: adj. 被剥夺的, 失去亲人的, 丧失的
example: The place seemed to be utterly bereft of human life. 看起来，这地方人迹罕至。

translation: adj. 被防护者的, 被看守着的, 被监视着的, 警戒着的

translation: adj. 被践踏的, 被蹂躏的,被压制的
example: The owner is making huge profits at the expense of downtrodden peasants. 物主靠压榨农民而赢得暴利。

translation: adj. 被麻醉的, 笨的, 迟钝的
example: a dopey grin 咧开嘴的傻笑

translation: adj. 被抛弃了的
example: Her body was found dumped in a derelict warehouse less than a mile from her home. 她的尸体被发现丢在离她家不到一英里的一座废弃的仓库里。

translation: adj. 被先占的, 全神贯注的
example: What’s wrong with Cindy? She seems a little preoccupied. 辛迪怎么了？她好像有点心事重重。

translation: adj. 被遗弃的
adj. 被逐的, 被排斥的, 被遗弃的
adj. 本国的
adj. 本体的, 实体的
example: So government publicity is government ontic being, but not public entity or idiographic publicity. 因而公共性是政府的实体性存在，而非公共实体和具体的公共性。

translation: adj. 本土的
example: the many indigenous cultures which existed in Siberia 存在于西伯利亚的许多当地文化

translation: adj. 笨重的, 粗陋的
example: Two hulking figures guarded the entrance of the club. 两个壮汉守卫在俱乐部门口。

translation: adj. 笨拙的
example: A clumsy waiter spilled wine all over her new skirt. 一名笨手笨脚的服务员把葡萄酒洒得她新裙子上到处都是。

translation: adj. 笨拙的, （树）劈成木材的
adj. 笨拙的, 不实用的, 难处理的, 难使用的, 笨重的

translation: adj. 笨拙的, 粗鲁的, 偏转的, 无礼的
example: It would be gauche to mention the price. 提及价格是不得体的。

translation: adj. 笨拙的, 粗俗的, 不舒适的
example: The article says that this could be because women can ‘better appreciate the thought and expense’ that goes into buying and wrapping chocolates than the uncouth men who wolf them down. 文章显示这可能是因为女性能更好的欣赏想法和消费而购买和包装巧克力，相反笨拙的男性会直接将其大口大口的吃掉。

translation: adj. 鼻的, 鼻音的, 护鼻的
example: the nasal passage 鼻腔

translation: adj. 比喻的, 修饰丰富的, 形容多的
example: He’s my son, in the figurative sense of the word. 打个比方，他就像是我的儿子。

translation: adj. 必需做的, 必修的, 被强迫的, 被强制的, 义务的
example: the threat of compulsory redundancies 强制性裁员的威胁

translation: adj. 贬损的
example: Their conversation contained a number of derogatory racial remarks . 他们的谈话包含了一些带有种族偏见的侮辱性言论。

translation: adj. 扁长的
example: Passive energy dissipation existing in the spinner of prolate dual-spin satellite will lead to nutation divergence. 细长体双自旋卫星自旋部分的能量耗散会导致卫星章动运动的发散。

translation: adj. 变动小的, 平静的
example: a young man with a naturally equable temperament 生性温和的年轻人

translation: adj. 变化多端的
example: He is a protean stylist who can move from blues to ballads and grand symphony. 他是一位富有变化的艺术家，能从布鲁斯转换到民谣以及雄壮的交响乐。

translation: adj. 变化无常的
example: The theological critique is that Homer simply depicts the gods as false, as fickle, and inconstant. 神学批评是,荷马将众神描绘成,是虚假、易变且无常。

translation: adj. 变坏的, 轻蔑的
example: For hard-line Republicans, the word ‘liberal’ had become a pejorative term. 对强硬派共和党来说，“自由”一词已成了贬义词。

translation: adj. 辩论法, 辩论术, 好辩的, 挑起争端的
example: The reforms were attacked in a highly polemical piece in the ‘New Yorker’. 《纽约客》一篇措辞强硬的文章猛烈抨击了这些改革。

translation: adj. 标准的, 整齐的, 有规则的

translation: adj. 标准化的

translation: adj. 表面的, 肤浅的, 浅薄的
example: They only have the most superficial understanding of prison life. 他们对监狱生活只有最粗浅的了解。

translation: adj. 表面弯曲如球的外侧, 凸起的

translation: adj. 表示疑问的, 质问的

translation: adj. 彬彬有礼的, 文雅的
example: Neil was urbane, witty, direct, and honest. 尼尔文雅机智，坦率诚实。

translation: adj. 彬彬有礼的, 殷勤的, 柔顺的
adj. 病的, 由病引起的, 病态的, 恐怖的

translation: adj. 波状的, 摇摆的, 起浪的, 波动的, 不稳的
example: She had short, wavy brown hair. 她有一头又短又卷的褐发。

translation: adj. 伯父的, 伯父似的
example: an avuncular pat on the shoulder 慈爱地拍拍肩膀

translation: adj. 博学的
example: There’s also the intrinsic pleasure you get from boosting your knowledge and becoming more erudite. 这也有利于你发自内心地努力奋进获得更多学识变得更博学。

translation: adj. 跛的, 犹豫的, 蹒跚的
example: We carried on a rather halting conversation. 我们断断续续地交谈。

translation: adj. 补助的
adj. 补助的, 副的
example: Agreement was reached on several ancillary matters. 就一些相关问题达成了协议。

translation: adj. 捕食生物的, 猛禽类的
example: Compared with omnivorous pheasants, insectivorous birds and raptorial birds Koklass's digestive system is similar to the typical phytophagous birds. 与杂食性鸡类、食虫鸟类及猛禽比较，勺鸡的消化系统具有典型植食性鸟类的特征。

translation: adj. 不爱说话的, 沉默寡言的
adj. 不安的, 不沉着的, 烦燥的, 难以取悦的
example: The boys get fidgety if they can’t play outside. 要是不能出去玩，这些男孩子就会坐立不安。

translation: adj. 不安定的, 易发生变化的
example: Sex is used by histrionics to prop up their self-esteem and to regulate their labile sense of self-worth. 演献症患者用性行为来支持她们的自尊，调节她们不安定的自尊感。

translation: adj. 不道德的, 邪恶的, 放荡的, 淫荡的
example: Deliberately making people suffer is immoral. 故意使人吃苦头是不道德的。

translation: adj. 不断的, 不停的
example: The child’s incessant talking started to irritate her. 这孩子喋喋不休，她开始烦躁起来。

translation: adj. 不肥沃的, 贫瘠的, 不毛的, 不结果实的
example: infertile couples 不孕的夫妇

translation: adj. 不分皂白的, 不加选择的
example: the indiscriminate use of chemical fertilizers 化肥的滥用

translation: adj. 不服权威的
example: I come from a recusant family and was educated at Catholic schools. 我出生在一个不服英国国教的家庭，在天主教学校里接受的教育。

translation: adj. 不公正的
example: an iniquitous system of taxation 一种极不公正的税收制度

translation: adj. 不顾及别人的, 轻率的
example: inconsiderate motorists 不为别人着想的驾车者

translation: adj. 不关心政治的
example: a group of apolitical young professional people 一群不问政事的年轻专业人士

translation: adj. 不光彩的

translation: adj. 不规则的, 反常的
example: a highly anomalous situation 极其反常的形势

translation: adj. 不害羞的
example: She stared at him with unabashed curiosity. 她好奇地盯着他看，一点也不难为情。

translation: adj. 不合格的
example: They were ineligible to remain in the U.S. 他们没有资格继续留在美国了。

translation: adj. 不合格的, 不胜任的
example: an incompetent manager 不称职的经理

translation: adj. 不合理的, 不受良心节制的, 过度的
example: The war caused an unconscionable amount of suffering. 战争造成了太多的苦难。

translation: adj. 不合逻辑的, 不合理的
example: inconsequential but amusing chatter 无谓但有趣的闲扯

translation: adj. 不合身的
example: Austin displayed conduct unbecoming of an officer and a gentleman. 奥斯汀的行为不符合军官和绅士的身份。

translation: adj. 不合需要的, 不受欢迎的, 令人不快的
example: punishment of undesirable behaviour 对不良行为的惩罚

translation: adj. 不滑的
example: This kind of type is characteristic of nonskid stops on wet roads. 这种轮胎的特点是在潮湿的路面上不打滑。

translation: adj. 不缓和的, 不安静的
example: implacable enemies 死敌

translation: adj. 不悔悟的, 顽固的
example: Endless, of the impenitent and unbelieving. 无止境的，对不知悔改的和不信。

translation: adj. 不会受伤害的, 无懈可击的
example: Gerry’s confidence made him feel invulnerable. 自信让格里觉得自己无懈可击。

translation: adj. 不吉利的, 不幸的, 不合适的
adj. 不计后果的
example: He was accused of causing death by reckless driving . 他被控因鲁莽驾驶致人死亡。

translation: adj. 不矫揉造作的, 自然的, 真挚的, 未受影响的, 未被感动的
example: her easy unaffected manner 她那从容而自然的举止

translation: adj. 不洁的, 污秽的, 丑恶的
example: The house was filthy, with clothes and newspapers strewn everywhere. 屋子里很脏，衣服和报纸扔得到处都是。

translation: adj. 不精通的, 不熟练的, 无知的, 无经验的
adj. 不均匀的, 不对称的
example: Well, unless you have an asymmetric set-up, in which case the client can POST and/or PUT its order somewhere on the server. 那么，除非你有一个不对称的设置，在这种情况下，客户端可以POST和/或PUT它的订单到服务器的某处。

translation: adj. 不可避免的, 无法逃避的
example: ...the ineluctable tendency of populations to exceed resources. ...人口超出资源承载限度的不可避免的趋势。

translation: adj. 不可变的, 不变的, 不能变的, 永恒的
example: This decision should not be seen as immutable. 不该把这个决定看成是不可改变的。

translation: adj. 不可抵抗的, 不能压制的
example: I was overcome by an irresistible urge to cry. 我控制不住想大哭一场。

translation: adj. 不可估计的
example: There can never be a definitive version of a myth, because it refers to the more imponderable aspects of life. 一个神话永远不可能有一个最终版本，因为它涉及到生命中更加无法估量的各个方面。

translation: adj. 不快的
adj. 不宽容的, 偏狭的
example: She’s lactose-intolerant (= unable to drink particular types of milk ). 她对乳糖过敏。

translation: adj. 不连贯的, 语无伦次的
example: Ben, drunk and incoherent, slumped in a chair. 本醉得语无伦次，一屁股跌坐在一把椅子上。

translation: adj. 不连续的, 离散的
example: The change happens in a series of discrete steps. 这个变化在一系列分离的步骤中发生。

translation: adj. 不灵巧的
example: A mix of live action and CG animation, the story starts in the Middle Ages, when the maladroit sorcerer Gargamel (Hank Azaria) finally discovers the location of Smurf Village. 混合真人实景和计算机绘图动画，这个起源于中世纪的故事，笨拙的巫师格格巫（汉克 阿扎利亚）最终发现了蓝精灵村的所在地。

translation: adj. 不满的
example: Jason Kidd was once a gifted malcontent who essentially quit on the Nets to get himself traded to Dallas. 贾森·基德在篮网队效力时表现出了不满的情绪，最后主动要求交易到小牛队。

translation: adj. 不满的, 不高兴的
example: a disgruntled client 不满的客户

translation: adj. 不满意的
example: The black freedom struggle should be the model for all discontented Americans. 所有对现状不满的美国黑人都应以黑人自由运动为榜样。

translation: adj. 不明朗的, 不承担义务的
example: Mr. Hall is non-committal about the number of jobs that the development corporation has created. 霍尔先生对开发公司已创造的岗位数量含糊其词。

translation: adj. 不能除去的, 不能取消的
adj. 不能抵偿的, 不能平息的
example: It is inexpiable because God's gift itself is of such transcendence and holiness that it cannot be paid off by finite animal beings such as we are. 无法抵赎的原因是上帝本身,的天赋是如此卓越和神圣,不能只通过有限生物来还清。

translation: adj. 不能分割的, 除不尽的
example: Far from being separate, the mind and body form an indivisible whole. 心智与身体绝不是分离的,它们形成了一个不可分割的整体。

translation: adj. 不能取消的
example: Think about the situation carefully before you take an irrevocable step. 在你踏出不能回头的一步之前要三思。

translation: adj. 不能渗透的, 不渗透性的
example: No paint is impermeable to water vapour. 没有哪种涂料是不透水汽的。

translation: adj. 不能说的, 不应说出的, 避讳的
example: ineffable joy 难以形容的喜悦

translation: adj. 不能挽回的
example: Extensive mining will cause irreparable damage to the area. 大量采矿会对该地区造成无法弥补的损害。

translation: adj. 不能想像的, 难以相信的
example: A few years ago a car fuelled by solar energy would have been inconceivable. 几年前太阳能汽车还是不可思议的事。

translation: adj. 不能协调的, 矛盾的
example: Proponents of the urn: scheme argue that this tension is irreconcilable within the framework of HTTP and DNS. 方案的支持者争辩说，他们认为这种压力在 HTTP 和 DNS 的范围内是矛盾的。

translation: adj. 不能征服的, 无敌的
example: The might of the army is "invincible," according to state media but the refugees are rather cynical about the ill equipped force. 朝鲜官方媒体称朝鲜的军事力量是“无敌的”，可是朝鲜难民却对装备落后的军队表示出不屑。

translation: adj. 不能制胜的, 不能克服的
example: There were insuperable obstacles, and the plan was abandoned. 由于存在无法克服的障碍，计划被放弃了。

translation: adj. 不能治愈的
example: an incurable optimist 不可改变的乐观主义者

translation: adj. 不能自制的, 无节制的, 荒淫的, [医]失禁的
example: His diseased bladder left him incontinent. 他患病的膀胱使得他小便失禁。

translation: adj. 不屈不挠的, 大胆的
example: dauntless optimism 无所畏惧的乐观

translation: adj. 不屈服的, 不屈不挠的
example: an indomitable old lady 勇敢的老妇人

translation: adj. 不燃烧的
example: Gaseous helium is inert, colorless, odorless, non corrosive, and nonflammable. 气态氦极不活泼，无色，无嗅，无腐蚀性，不可燃。

translation: adj. 不让进入, 不会受到损伤的, 密封的, 不受影响的
example: impervious volcanic rock 不透水的火山岩

translation: adj. 不容置疑的, 确实的, 明白的
example: His brilliance renders this film an indubitable classic. 他的出色表现让这部电影成为了毋庸置疑的经典。

translation: adj. 不慎重的, 轻率的
example: It was very indiscreet of Colin to tell them about our plan. 科林把我们的计划告诉了他们，太不谨慎了。

translation: adj. 不生育的, 不孕的, 贫瘠的, 没有结果的, 无益的, 单调的, 无聊的, 空洞的
example: Thousands of years ago the surface was barren desert. 很久很久以前，地面还是一片荒漠。

translation: adj. 不是必要的, 可有可无的
example: Part-time workers are considered dispensable. 兼职工作人员被认为是可有可无的。

translation: adj. 不适当的, 无能的, 不称职的
example: inept leadership 拙劣的领导

translation: adj. 不适宜的
example: The way to change the phases of slacken production, inexpedient circulation is to realize the limited austerity. 要改变生产呆滞、流通不畅的局面，办法就是实现有限度的侈糜消费。

translation: adj. 不适中的
example: The budget buffet attracted customers with immoderate appetites but limited pocket books. 廉价的自助餐吸引了胃口大但囊中羞涩的顾客们。

translation: adj. 不受拘束的, 不守规矩的, 蛮横的, 难驾驭的
example: unruly children 难管教的孩子

translation: adj. 不舒服的, 不合适的
example: The speaker was regrettably indisposed. 很遗憾，演讲人身体不适。

translation: adj. 不顺从的, 不听话的
example: In industry, a worker who is grossly insubordinate is threatened with discharge. 在企业界，拒不服从指令的工人面临被解雇的威胁。

translation: adj. 不体面的, 不适宜的, 不恰当的
example: Ann thought it unseemly to kiss her husband in public. 安认为当众亲她丈夫不太得体。

translation: adj. 不调和的, 不和的, [乐]不悦耳的, 不和谐的
example: The modern decor strikes a discordant note in this old building. 现代化的装潢与这座古老的建筑本身很不协调。

translation: adj. 不调和的, 不适宜的
example: The new theatre looks utterly incongruous in its setting. 这座新剧院和周围的环境格格不入。

translation: adj. 不听令的, 顽固的, 反抗法院命令的
example: There is another efficacious method for subduing the most obstinate, contumacious sinner. 有另一个有效的方法来镇压那最为顽固，抗命不从的罪人。

translation: adj. 不同的, 变化多的
example: Albert Jones' new style will inevitably put him in touch with a much more diverse and perhaps younger audience. 艾伯特·琼斯的新风格无疑将使他接触更多形形色色的、或许更年轻的观众。

translation: adj. 不同种类的异类的
example: a heterogeneous collection of buildings 风格各异的一组建筑

translation: adj. 不稳定的
adj. 不稳定的
example: Her health remained precarious, despite the treatment. 她尽管接受了治疗，但健康状况还是不稳定。

translation: adj. 不相称的, 不适应的
example: This is my first time to face the pressure, and much of the pressure on you, even so, I still feel very incommensurate. 这是我第一次面对这些压力，而这其中的大部分压力都在你身上，即使如此，我依然觉得很不适应。

translation: adj. 不谐和的, 不调和的, 刺耳的
example: The final movement, a robust and often dissonant fugue, is a precursor to Beethoven’s startling, gritty “Grosse Fuge,” composed as the final movement of his Opus 130 String Quartet. 不协调的和音、爆裂刺耳的强音复调表现曲式是贝多芬大赋格曲的序奏部分。 他在弦乐四重奏作品130号也以此风格作为最后一个乐章。

translation: adj. 不懈的
example: unremitting poverty 长期的贫困

translation: adj. 不新奇的, 陈腐的, 常见的
example: Power corrupts and absolute power corrupts absolutely. That's the old hackneyed phrase, but it's true. 权力导致腐败，绝对权力导致绝对腐败。这虽是老生常谈，但无半点虚言。

translation: adj. 不信宗教的, 异端的
example: He promised to continue the fight against infidel forces. 他答应继续对抗异教势力。

translation: adj. 不朽的
example: Plato believed that the soul is immortal. 柏拉图认为灵魂不灭。

translation: adj. 回答的

translation: adj. 回响的

translation: adj. 火的, 似火的, [地]火成的

translation: adj. 禁止的
example: Beards are virtually verboten in corporate circles. 事实上，留胡子在各公司几乎是被禁止的。

translation: adj. 禁止的, 抑制的

example: He was held incommunicado in prison for ten days before being released without charge. 在被不予指控释放前，他在监狱里被单独监禁了10天。

translation: adj. 难的, 艰苦的，勇敢的

translation: adj. 难看的, 不象样的, 笨拙的

translation: adj. 难控制的

translation: adj. 难取悦的, 挑剔的, 苛求的, (微生物等)需要复杂营养地

translation: adj. 难识别的, 看不见的

translation: adj. 能适应的, 可修改的

translation: adj. 扭转的, 弯曲的

translation: adj. 农民的, 乡土气的, 粗野的, 粗鄙的

translation: adj. 偶然的, 外来的

translation: adj. 偶然的, 幸运的

translation: adj. 墙壁上的

translation: adj. 怯懦的
example: I think I am a coward, a recreant and a fool. Even now I don't know how to react when he shows me his eyes and grin. 我觉得自己是个懦夫、叛徒、白痴。直到现在我也不知道要在他向我展示他的双眸和微笑时如何反应。

translation: n. (猜字的)画谜

translation: v. 不安
v. 不给予
v. 不同意
example: There are some dissenting voices (= people who do not agree ) among the undergraduates. 大学生中有一些反对的呼声。

translation: v. 擦去
example: The revolutionaries expunged domestic opposition. 革命者清洗了国内反对派。

translation: v. 猜测
example: There's so little to go on, we can only surmise what happened. 几乎没有什么可继续进行的，我们只能猜测发生过的事。

translation: v. 策划
example: The project was masterminded by Morris, then aged 29. 这个项目由时年29岁的莫里斯策划。

translation: v. 拆开
example: He could unravel a knot that others wouldn't even attempt. 他能解开其他人甚至不敢尝试的绳结。

translation: v. 阐明, 清晰发言
example: ideas that he was to enunciate decades later 他将于数十年后清晰阐述的想法

translation: v. 偿还
example: I'll be happy to reimburse you for any expenses you've had. 我很乐意报销你的所有花费。

translation: v. 偿还, 补偿, 付报酬
example: Because my left eye is so weak, my right eye has to work harder to compensate. 因为我左眼视力差，右眼就要辛苦点来弥补一下。

translation: v. 超过
example: We outstripped all our competitors in sales last year. 去年我们的销售额超过了所有竞争对手。

translation: v. 嘲笑
v. 嘲笑
example: “Please don’t gibe me,” Lydia said. “请不要嘲笑我，”利迪娅说。

translation: v. 嘲笑, 骗, 挫败, 嘲弄
example: Opposition MPs mocked the government’s decision. 反对党议员讥笑政府的这一决策。

translation: v. 沉思
example: ‘Somewhere,’ he mused, ‘I’ve heard your name before.’ “我以前在哪里，”他沉思着说，“听说过你的名字。”

translation: v. 沉思, 考虑
example: He continued to ponder the problem as he walked home. 他一边往家走一边继续思考那个问题。

translation: v. 成为粒状
v. 承认
example: ...a public statement avowing neutrality. ...一份宣布中立的公开声明。

translation: v. 承认, 同意, [民法]确认, 批准
v. 澄清
v. 斥责, 责骂
example: ‘Edward, you are naughty,’ Dorothy chided. “爱德华，你真顽皮。”多萝西斥责道。

translation: v. 冲淡, 变淡, 变弱, 稀释
example: diluted fruit juice 稀释的果汁

translation: v. 充斥
example: the glutted property market 已经饱和的房地产市场

translation: v. 充满
example: The light of the setting sun suffused the clouds. 落日的霞光映红了云层。

translation: v. 崇拜, 爱慕, (口语)喜爱
example: Betty adores her grandchildren. 贝蒂非常宠爱孙辈。

translation: v. 崇敬
example: a symbol of Arab courage, to be venerated for generations 受到世代尊崇的阿拉伯人勇气的象征

translation: v. 酬劳
example: You will be remunerated and so will your staff. 你将会得到报酬，你的员工也会。

translation: v. 初次公演, 初演主角
example: The documentary premiered at the Jerusalem Film Festival. 那部记录片在耶路撒冷电影节上首映。

translation: v. 除去盐分, 淡化海水
v. 储藏
example: families who hoarded food during the strike 罢工期间囤积食品的家庭

translation: v. 储存
v. 处罚
example: Women feel professionally penalized for taking time off to raise children. 女性认为休假带孩子在职业上对自己不利。

translation: v. 吹捧
example: his much touted musical 他那出备受推崇的音乐剧

translation: v. 吹送, 飘荡
example: The scent of climbing roses wafts through the window. 蔷薇的香味随风从窗户飘进来。

translation: v. 垂涎, 觊觎
example: The Michelin Awards are coveted by restaurants all over the world. 米其林评级是全世界所有餐厅的渴望。

translation: v. 匆匆离开, 跑掉
example: What reason vamoose is people can'ts help wanting to ask him after all this factory?… 人们不禁要问他究竟是什么原因匆匆离开这个厂？

translation: v. 窜改, 添写进去, 插入新语句
example: He started humming a tune, then interpolated the odd word as though having difficulty remembering. 他开始哼起一个曲调，尽管记得不太清楚，他又插入了几个词。

translation: v. 篡夺, 篡位, 侵占
example: There were a couple of attempts to usurp the young king. 屡次有人企图篡夺那位年轻国王的王位。

translation: v. 催促, 赶紧, 促进, 加速
example: Their departure was hastened by an abnormally cold winter. 那个冬天异常寒冷，所以他们提前走了。

translation: v. 挫败, 阻挠, 使感到灰心, 阻止
example: Their attempts to speak to him were frustrated by the guards. 他们想跟他说话，但被警卫拦住了。

translation: v. 打扮, 装饰
example: She spends hours primping in front of the mirror. 她总是花很长时间在镜子前梳妆打扮。

translation: v. 打扮, 装饰, 化妆
v. 打嗝, (火山、炮等)冒烟、喷出
example: a line of chimneys belching out smoke 喷吐着浓烟的一排烟囱

translation: v. 打击
example: Overly proud people refuse to admit their mistakes — and sometimes even deny the fact that they make them — because they feel that it would impugn their image. 过于自负的人拒绝承认自己的错误 — 甚至有时候否认自己制造错误的事实 — 因为他们感觉那将会打击到自己的形象。

translation: v. 打孔
example: A broken rib had perforated her lung. 一根肋骨骨折，刺穿了她的肺部。

translation: v. 打扫, 以(腐肉)为食, 从废物中提取
example: Pigs scavenged among the rubbish. 猪在垃圾堆里觅食。

translation: v. 大步走(过), 跨过, 大步行走
example: They were joined by a newcomer who came striding across a field. 他们中又来了个新人，那人穿过一块田地大步走过来。

translation: v. 大量出现
example: God, said, ‘Let the waters teem with countless living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth across the vault of heaven. 上帝说：“水中要有万种游鱼，地上要有无数飞鸟”于是上帝创造出种类繁多的大小鱼类及飞鸟。

translation: v. 大批滋生
example: ...pests like aphids which infest cereal crops. …像蚜虫那样大肆侵害谷类作物的害虫。

translation: v. 大声叫, 大叫, 喊叫
v. 导致, 有利于
example: It is for psychologists to debate how far this method is likely to conduce to a better grasp of things. 关于这种体罚方式能在多大程度上引导小孩对事物有更好的认识，这个问题可以留给心理学家去讨论。

translation: v. 捣碎
example: Mash the bananas. 把香蕉捣烂。

translation: v. 到处翻寻, 搜出, 检查
example: They rummage through piles of secondhand clothes for something that fits. 他们在成堆的二手衣服中翻找合身的衣服。

translation: v. 盗, 偷, 窃
example: The staff were pilfering behind the bar. 工作人员在吧台后面偷东西。

translation: v. 等候
example: Then saith he unto them, My soul is exceeding sorrowful, even unto death: tarry ye here, and watch with me. 便对他们说，我心里甚是忧伤，几乎要死。 你们在这里等候，和我一同儆醒。

translation: v. 低垂, 凋萎, 萎靡
example: The plant needs some water – it’s starting to droop. 这株植物需要浇些水——它开始打蔫了。

translation: v. 低声歌唱, 低声哼, 低吟
example: He would much rather have been crooning in a smoky bar. 他宁愿是在充满烟气的酒吧里低声哼唱。

translation: v. 滴流
example: A tear trickled down the old man's cheek. 一滴泪水顺着老人的面颊流了下来。

translation: v. 滴下
example: Blood from the wound dribbled down the side of his face. 伤口的血顺着他脸颊流下来。

translation: v. 颠倒, 倒放
example: He upended the beer, and swallowed. 他把啤酒倒出来，大口喝了。

translation: v. 点火, 点燃
example: The petrol tank suddenly ignited. 油箱突然着火了。

translation: v. 玷污
example: a scandal that sullied his reputation 玷污了他名誉的丑闻

translation: v. 雕刻, 切开
example: carved wooden chairs 木雕椅子

translation: v. 雕刻, 造型
example: An artist sculpted a full-size replica of her head. 一位艺术家雕塑了一尊她头部的全幅头像。

translation: v. 跌跌撞撞地走, 犯大错, 做错
example: They blundered badly when they gave him the job. 他们犯了大错，让他做这份工作。

translation: v. 盯, 凝视
example: Patrick sat gazing into space  (= looking straight in front, not at any particular person or thing ). 帕特里克坐着，茫然地看着前方。

translation: v. 冬眠
example: Dormice hibernate from October to May. 睡鼠从10月到5月冬眠。

translation: v. 逗留
v. 逗留, 闲荡, 拖延, 游移
example: I spent a week at Kandersteg and could happily have lingered on. 我在坎德施泰格逗留了一个星期，本来还可以开开心心地多待几天。

translation: v. 断绝关系
example: These groups must renounce violence if there is to be progress towards peace. 若要迈向和平，这些组织就必须放弃使用暴力。

translation: v. 断言, 声称
example: French cooking, she asserted, is the best in the world. 她坚称法国菜是世界上最好的。

translation: v. 蹲坐, 蹲伏
example: We squatted beside the pool and watched the diver sink slowly down. 我们蹲在池边，看潜水员慢慢沉下水。

translation: v. 躲避
example: He eluded his pursuers by escaping into a river. 他逃到河里，甩掉了追踪他的人。

translation: v. 扼杀
example: policies which are throttling many Asian economies 抑制许多亚洲国家经济发展的政策

translation: v. 发出臭味
example: It stinks in here! 这里很臭！

translation: v. 发出火花, 闪耀光芒
v. 发火花, (使)闪耀, (香槟酒等)发泡, 用眼神表达, 发光闪烁
example: The sea sparkled in the sun. 阳光下大海碧波闪耀。

translation: v. 发狂
example: I flip through my favorite papers and magazines, the images as crisp as in print, without a maddening wait for each page to load. 我浏览着我喜爱的报纸和杂志，图片犹如印刷的一般明亮清晰，每一页的载入没有出现令人发狂的等待。

translation: v. 发明, 设计, 图谋
example: In 1862, a technique was contrived to take a series of photographs showing stages of movement. 1862年时发明了一种技术，可以拍出一连串展示连续动作的照片。

translation: v. 发芽, 发育, 使生长
example: Some seed varieties germinate fast, so check every day or so. 有一些品种的种子发芽快，所以差不多每天都要察看一下。

translation: v. 烦恼
v. 繁殖, 传播, 宣传
example: The group launched a website to propagate its ideas . 这个团体建了一个网站来宣扬他们的主张。

translation: v. 反驳, 反击, 回报
example: ‘It’s all your fault!’ he retorted. “那都是你的错！”他反驳道。

translation: v. 反常
example: I do not want my son learning how to be a disgusting pervert from these men and seeing this behaviour as normal. 我不希望我的儿子向这些变态的男人学习，并且认为这是一种十分正常的行为。

translation: v. 反刍, 沉思
example: One is to see whether you have any worry triggers and to distract yourself when you begin to ruminate. 首先看看你自己是否有担忧的动机，如果当你自己出现“沉思”时，尽量分散自己的注意力。

translation: v. 反对, 反抗
v. 反抗, 起义, 反叛, 反感, 厌恶
example: He was revolted by the smell. 那气味让他恶心。

translation: v. 反射, 反映, 表现, 反省, 细想
example: The drop in consumer spending reflects concern about the economy. 消费支出的下降反映出人们对经济的担忧。

translation: v. 反响
example: Day in and day out, the flat crack of the tank guns reverberates through the little Bavarian town. 日复一日地，单调的坦克炮的轰隆声在巴伐利亚的这个小镇上空回响着。

translation: v. 反责, 反唇相讥, 反控诉
v. 犯
example: Who could have perpetrated such a dreadful crime? 谁会犯下如此可怕的罪行？

translation: v. 妨碍
example: We do not ask others to be faultless , we only ask their faults should not incommode to our own . 我们不要求他人完美无缺，我们只要求他们的缺陷不会妨碍我们。

translation: v. 妨碍, 牵制
example: She tried to run, but was hampered by her heavy suitcase. 她想跑，但沉重的旅行箱拖累了她。

translation: v. 放牧, 吃草, 擦伤, 擦过
example: I fell on the gravel, severely grazing my knee. 我摔倒在砾石路上，膝盖擦伤得很严重。

translation: v. 放弃
example: She waived her right to a lawyer. 她放弃了请律师的权利。

translation: v. 放弃
example: No one wants to relinquish power once they have it. 人一旦有了权就不想放弃。

translation: v. 放弃
example: White House officials ordered Williams to recant. 白宫官员命令威廉斯公开宣布放弃自己的观点。

translation: v. 放弃, 弃权, 拒绝
v. 飞跑, 加上条纹
example: The sky was streaked yellow and purple. 天空被染成一条一条的黄色和紫色。

translation: v. 非难
v. 诽谤
example: She had seen herself repeatedly maligned in the newspapers. 她看到自己在报纸上一再受到诽谤。

translation: v. 诽谤
example: Sgt. Norwood complained that the article defamed him. 诺维德中士抱怨这篇文章诽谤他。

translation: v. 废除
example: The governor does not have the authority to rescind the ruling. 该州长无权撤销这项裁决。

translation: v. 废除, 取消, 废止
example: Their marriage was annulled last year. 他们的婚姻关系去年宣告解除。

translation: v. 废止, 撤销, 否定, 放弃, 废除
example: The government has just repealed the law segregating public facilities. 政府刚刚废除了隔离公共设施的法令。

translation: v. 沸腾
v. 分解, (使)腐烂
example: a partially decomposed body 部分腐烂的尸体

translation: v. 分期清偿
example: There's little advantage to amortizing the loan, especially on a 30 or 40-year basis. 分期偿还这项贷款没有什么好处，尤其是按30或40年偿还。

translation: v. 分为两叉
example: At this location the two roads divaricate. 两路在此地点分开。

translation: v. 愤恨, 怨恨
example: Paul resented the fact that Carol didn’t trust him. 保罗非常气愤，因为卡萝尔不信任他。

translation: v. 缝, 缝合
example: Mary is stitching a bedspread. 玛丽在缝床罩。

translation: v. 否认
example: No one dared to gainsay him. 没有人敢反驳他。

translation: v. 抚弄
example: She fondled his neck. 她抚摸着他的脖子。

translation: v. 复兴
example: The Home Office have resurrected plans to build a new prison just outside London. 内政部重新提出了在伦敦市外建一座监狱的计划。

translation: v. 复员
example: programmes to help demobilized soldiers fit into civilian life 帮助复员军人适应平民生活的方案

translation: v. 复原
example: Winston proposed several ways for the industry to recuperate. 温斯顿为复兴这个行业提出了几种办法。

translation: v. 复制
example: There is a need for further research to replicate these findings. 需要进一步的研究来验证这些结果。

translation: v. 富有成果
v. 嘎扎嘎扎的咬嚼, 压碎, 扎扎地踏过
example: She sucked an ice cube into her mouth, and crunched it loudly. 她把一冰块儿含在嘴里，并嘎吱嘎吱地大声嚼起来。

translation: v. 改变
example: Ascension long ago served to transmute karma of the consensus known as Earth so that Earth could retain her vibration. 很久之前，提升就为改变地球这个一致实相的业力而服务，好让地球可留在其振动中。

translation: v. 感到恐惧
v. 感染
example: When performing taint flow analysis, the scanner models the flow of data within the system. 当执行污染流分析时，检测器会在这个系统中为数据流建立模型。

translation: v. 感应
v. 割裂
example: His fingers were badly lacerated by the broken glass. 他的手指被碎玻璃严重割伤。

translation: v. 隔离
example: A large detachment of police was used to segregate the two rival camps of protesters. 一大队分遣警察被派来隔离两群敌对的抗议者。

translation: v. 隔离
example: In the early 1990’s an extreme form of isolation emerged, where young Japanese people seclude themselves in their homes for months or even years at a time. 早在20世纪90年代初的时候，日本出现了一种极端的孤独症状，患有此症状的日本青年人一度成年累月地把自己隔离在家中。

translation: v. 根除
example: an attempt to eradicate inflation 为消除通货膨胀所作的努力

translation: v. 巩固
example: The company has consolidated its position as the country’s leading gas supplier. 这家公司巩固了作为该国主要煤气供应商的地位。

translation: v. 共谋, 阴谋, (指事件)凑合起来
example: They'd conspired to overthrow the government. 他们曾合谋推翻政府。

translation: v. 供给, 供应
example: DJ Dominic purveys a unique brand of music. 音乐节目主持人多米尼克播放一种独特的音乐。

translation: v. 鼓吹
example: Alexander has been preaching patience. 亚历山大一直宣扬要坚忍。

translation: v. 鼓动
example: He accused union leaders of instigating the disturbances. 他指责工会领导人煽动骚乱。

translation: v. 鼓舞
example: Carey’s hope was that the church would be renewed and invigorated. 凯里希望教会能复兴。

translation: v. 灌输
example: People were indoctrinated not to question their leaders. 人们被灌输对领导人不得置疑的观念。

translation: v. 灌输
example: The diagram implanted a dangerous prejudice firmly in the minds of countless economics students. 该图表在无数经济学学生的头脑中牢牢地灌输了一种危险的偏见。

translation: v. 灌醉
example: To rise thither with my inebriate Soul! 带着我的酒醉的灵魂向那里飞腾！

translation: v. 规避, 逃避, 躲避
example: You can’t go on evading your responsibilities in this way. 你不能这样继续逃避责任。

translation: v. 规定, 保证
example: Laws stipulate the maximum interest rate that banks can charge. 法律对银行可以收取的最高利率作了规定。

translation: v. 骇人听闻的, 可怕的
example: Every article on the breakfast table was fetched away with a hideous crash. 早餐桌上的每件物品随着可怕的撞击声移动了位置。

translation: v. 行乞, 乞讨, 贩卖
example: Can I cadge a cigarette? 我可以讨一根香烟吗？

translation: v. 嚎叫, 怒吼, 嚎啕大哭, 喝住, 号叫
example: The dogs howled all night. 那些狗整夜嘷叫。

translation: v. 合并
example: He conflates two images from Kipling’s short stories in the film. 影片中，他把吉卜林短篇小说中的两个人物形象合并在一起。

translation: v. 合并, 并入, 结合, 吞没, 融合
example: The company plans to merge its subsidiaries in the US. 该公司计划合并其在美国的几家子公司。

translation: v. 横着走, 悄悄贴近, 侧身而行
example: A young man sidled up to me and said, "May I help you?" 一个年轻人悄悄地走向我，并说道：“我可以帮你吗？”

translation: v. 哄骗
v. 后悔, 悔改, 忏悔, 悔悟
example: Those who refuse to repent, he said, will be punished. 他说，那些不肯悔悟的人将受到惩罚。

translation: v. 后退
example: The flood waters finally began to recede in November. 11 月，洪水终于开始退去。

translation: v. 呼气, 发出, 发散, <古>使蒸发
example: Take a deep breath, then exhale slowly. 深吸一口气，然后慢慢呼出。

translation: v. 忽视
v. 互给, 酬答, 互换, 报答
example: I would like to think the way I treat people is reciprocated. 我愿意认为我对待别人的方式得到了同等的回应。

translation: v. 互锁
example: a puzzle with 500 interlocking pieces 由500个紧密相扣的块组成的拼图

translation: v. 划分界线
example: A special UN commission was formed to demarcate the border. 一个特别联合国委员会被设立以期划定边界。

translation: v. 滑行, 悄悄地走, (时间)消逝, 滑翔
example: Waiters glide between tightly packed tables bearing trays of pasta. 侍者们托着一盘盘的意大利面食在拥挤的餐桌间自如穿行。

translation: v. 化妆, 打扮
v. 环绕盘旋

translation: v. 挥
example: Those under suspicion can also wield supreme power over their potential accusers, or be in charge of allocating funding to their projects or institutions. 那些被怀疑的人也会向那些潜在的指控者挥舞权力的大棒，或者掌管着为后者及其单位分配经费。

translation: v. 恢复
example: California reinstated the death penalty in 1977. 加利福尼亚于1977年恢复了死刑。

translation: v. 回忆
example: Drink a glass of wine, coffee, or tea, read a good book, or watch a good movie. Look at old photographs and reminisce. 喝上一杯酒，咖啡或茶，然后读本好书，或看场精彩的电影，也可以翻翻老照片，回忆过去。

translation: v. 回转
v. 毁伤
example: The prisoners had been tortured and mutilated. 犯人遭受了酷刑并被殴打致残。

translation: v. 毁誉
example: people who denigrate their own country 贬损自己国家的人

translation: v. 混合, 合并
example: She sang the first verse again, listening to the way the words melded with the music. 她再次吟咏了第一节，倾听着歌词与音乐的交融。

translation: v. 混乱
example: If the Pope's initiative succeeds, the Church of England will be further weakened and plunged into even greater disarray. 如果教皇的倡议倡议获得成功，英国教会将进一步削弱并陷入到更大的混乱中。

translation: v. 机动
example: All the fighters landed safely on the airport after the military maneuver. 在军事演习后，所有战斗机都安全降落在机场上。

translation: v. 激发

translation: v. 激怒
example: It exasperates me to hear comments like that. 听到那样的评论令我恼怒。

translation: v. 即席演说, 即兴演奏, 当场作成

translation: v. 疾跑美国著名的通讯公司
v. 计算, 估计, 用计算机计算(或确定)

translation: v. 加速, 促进

translation: v. 加速, 派出

translation: v. 假装, 伪装, 掩饰

translation: v. 驾驶, 掌舵

translation: v. 坚持

translation: v. 艰难行进

translation: v. 减轻

example: Evan leaned forward and began nuzzling her shoulder. 埃文靠过去蹭她的肩膀。

translation: v. 降低
v. 交换

translation: v. 接合

translation: v. 接合

translation: v. 节约, 节省, 有效地利用

translation: v. 节约使用
example: Many families must skimp on their food and other necessities just to meet the monthly rent. 为了交每月的租金，许多家庭不得不节省食物和其他必需品的支出。

translation: v. 结合, 融合
example: He tried to syncretize historical and logical empiricism view on scientific rationality. 在关于科学合理性问题上他试图融合历史的和逻辑经验主义的观点。

translation: v. 解散, 裁减

translation: v. 解释, 分析, 直译
example: What may seem helpful behaviour to you can be construed as interference by others. 在你看来似乎有助益的行为会被他人看作干涉。

translation: v. 紧缩节省
v. 晋升
example: But it can also inspire and uplift and exalt, because power can be used to help people accomplish marvelous things. 但是，权力也可以激励人、振奋人和提升人，因为它可以帮助人们成就非同寻常的事业。

translation: v. 浸, 泡, 浸透

translation: v. 浸软

translation: v. 浸透

translation: v. 沮丧

translation: v. 开脱

translation: v. 砍
example: hewn stone 切割好的石头

translation: v. 砍

translation: v. 烤(肉), 酷热

translation: v. 恳求, 哀求

translation: v. 恳求, 哀求, 恳请, 祈祷

example: She crumpled the paper in her hand. 她把手中的纸揉成了一团。

translation: v. 蹒跚

example: They agreed to indemnify the taxpayers against any loss. 他们同意赔偿纳税人的任何损失。

translation: v. 批判
example: Leaders urged people to turn out in large numbers to repudiate the violence. 领导们力劝人们集体出面来声讨该暴力。

translation: v. 批判
example: an excoriating review in ‘The Times’ 《泰晤士报》刊登的一篇措辞严厉的评论

translation: v. 批准
example: an authorized biography 授权传记

translation: v. 劈开, (使)裂开, 分裂, 分离
example: It was feared that the issue would split the church. 人们担心这一问题会导致教会分裂。

translation: v. 偏航
example: As the plane climbed to 370 feet, it started yawing. 飞机攀升到370英尺高时开始偏航。

translation: v. 骗取
v. 漂白, 使变白, 遮断阳光发白
example: Patrick visibly blanched. 帕特里克的脸色明显地变得苍白。

translation: v. 平息
example: He attempted to mollify her. 他想安抚她。

translation: v. 迫害
example: The Puritans left England to escape being persecuted. 清教徒离开了英国以躲避迫害。

translation: v. 破坏
example: The continued fighting threatens to undermine efforts to negotiate an agreement. 持续的战斗有可能破坏通过谈判达成协议的努力。

translation: v. 破坏, 侵犯, 违反
example: A backup copy of a computer program does not infringe copyright. 计算机程序的备份不侵犯版权。

translation: v. 破裂, 裂开, 断绝(关系等), 割裂
example: The pipe will rupture at its weakest point. 管道最薄弱的地方会破裂的。

translation: v. 期满, 终止, 呼气, 断气, 届满
example: The chairman’s term of office has already expired. 主席任期已满。

translation: v. 欺骗, 瞒
example: What devil was 't that thus hath cozen'd you at hoodman-blind? 是什么魔鬼如此欺骗了你这个瞎眼的女人？

translation: v. 启迪
example: She brought me to the field and enlightened me. 她将我领进了这个领域，给我启迪。

translation: v. 启发
example: If you study my project, it might edify your mind. “我想是你把我看成自我主义者了。” 汤姆说，“如果你研究一下我的工程，你的思想会受到启发。

translation: v. 弃绝
example: She spurned all offers of help. 她骄傲地拒绝一切帮助。

translation: v. 潜逃
v. 遣返
example: After the war, prisoners were repatriated. 战后，战俘被遣返。

translation: v. 谴责
example: It may be tempting for some to decry incentives as nothing but a poisonous fruit of Con-Lib responsibility thinking. 对一些人谴责激励机制只是作为“新政治”责任思考的毒果这样的结论本身是很冒险的。

translation: v. 强夺
example: She'll never know how close she came to being dragged off and ravished. 她永远都不会知道她差一点就被人拖走强暴了。

translation: v. 强求
example: One can no longer walk the streets without seeing beggars importuning passersby. 走在这些街道上总能看到乞丐纠缠行人乞讨。

translation: v. 抢劫
example: The rich provinces of Asia Minor were plundered by the invaders. 小亚细亚的富饶地区遭到侵略者的劫掠。

translation: v. 敲诈, 逼取, 强取, 勒索
example: Corrupt government officials were extorting money from him. 腐败的政府官员那时正向他勒索钱财。

translation: v. 巧辩, 演讲, 高声朗读
v. 切, 削, 削减, 损害
example: We need to whittle down the list of guests for the party. 我们需要缩减聚会的客人名单。

translation: v. 切断
example: Martin’s hand was severed in the accident. 马丁的一只手在事故中被切断了。

translation: v. 切开, 分离
example: The city is being sundered by racial tension. 该城市因民族关系紧张而正在分裂。

translation: v. 切碎

translation: v. 倾倒
example: This scandal could topple the government. 这一丑闻可能使政府倒台。

translation: v. 倾诉, 委托, 信赖
v. 清洁
example: This is usually fine, unless they forget to sanitize, or check, the incoming data. 这通常是没问题的，除非他们忘记清洁或检查输入数据。

translation: v. 清算
example: The stock was sold to liquidate the loan. 股票被卖出以偿还贷款。

translation: v. 求爱, 追求, 恳求, 招致
v. 驱散, (使)(云、雾、疑虑等)消散, 浪费(金钱或时间)
example: As he thought it over, his anger gradually dissipated. 他想明白后，怒气就渐渐消了。

translation: v. 驱逐
example: the revolution that failed to dislodge the British in 1919 未能推翻英国统治的1919年革命

translation: v. 驱逐, 开除, 排出, 发射
example: More than five-thousand high school students have been expelled for cheating. 五千多名中学生因考试作弊而被开除。

translation: v. 驱逐, 逐出(租户), 收回(租屋、租地等)
v. 屈服
example: He genuflected in front of the altar. 他在祭坛前屈膝施礼。

translation: v. 取消
example: When you encounter a particular strain, your body eventually produces antibodies to it, which remain on hand to quash that virus the next time you’re exposed. 当你遇到一种特殊的抗原时，你体内最终就会产生抗体对付它，下次你再感染这种病毒就会马上产生抗体消灭它。

translation: v. 去乡下, 使定居乡下
v. 劝解
example: I've never gone out of my way to propitiate people. 我从未违心安慰过别人。

translation: v. 劝诫, 忠告
example: Kennedy exhorted his listeners to turn away from violence. 肯尼迪劝告他的听众要远离暴力。

translation: v. 确保
example: He offered to avouch his innocence with his sword. 他表示愿以剑来保证他是无辜的。

translation: v. 群集
example: Tourists thronged the bars and restaurants. 游客挤满了酒吧和餐馆。

translation: v. 燃烧
v. 染污
example: Hallam’s tomb had been defiled and looted. 哈勒姆的坟墓遭到了亵渎和洗劫。

translation: v. 扰乱
example: They fear the public ignoring their jobs so that city services are not maintained, a discomfit to the elite. 他们也害怕公众不再去上班，导致城市服务无法维持，这种情况会扰乱精英们的计划。

translation: v. 认为, 相信
example: French and German were deemed essential. 法语和德语被认为是必需的。

translation: v. 融化
example: Objective To evaluate the therapeutic efficacy of percutaneous ethanol injection (PEI) under CT guidance to ablate retroperitoneal or intraperitoneal metastatic lymph nodes. 目的研究CT引导下经皮穿刺酒精消融疗法对腹膜后或腹腔转移性淋巴结的治疗价值。

translation: v. 蠕动
example: Christine squirmed uncomfortably in her chair. 克里斯蒂娜坐在椅子上不自在地扭来扭去。

translation: v. 辱骂, 斥责
example: The President was now reviled by the same party he had helped to lead. 如今谩骂总统的正是他曾经协助领导的那个政党。

example: Their ideas diffused quickly across Europe. 他们的观点很快在欧洲传播开来。

translation: v. 散布
example: Her findings have been widely disseminated . 她的发现已广为传播。

translation: v. 搔痒, 使愉快
v. 傻笑

translation: v. 删除
example: He heavily expurgated the work in its second edition. 在第二版中，他大幅删减了该作品。

example: glistening black hair 乌黑发亮的头发

translation: v. 闪烁

translation: v. 烧焦, 枯萎
example: The walls had been blackened and scorched by fire. 这些墙被大火熏黑了。

translation: v. 设路障

translation: v. 神化

translation: v. 渗出, 渗漏

translation: v. 渗透

translation: v. 施催眠术
v. 石化,吓呆

translation: v. 蚀刻

translation: v. 使潮湿, 使沮丧
v. 使失掉人性, 使成兽性

translation: v. 使与汞混合, 合并

translation: v. 适合, 属于

translation: v. 疏远

translation: v. 说明

translation: v. 思考, 考虑

translation: v. 撕, 剥, 劈, 锯, 裂开, 撕裂

translation: v. 撕碎
example: ...pain that rends the heart. ...撕心裂肺的疼痛。

translation: v. 嘶嘶作声, 用嘘声表示

translation: v. 松弛, 放慢, 减弱, 减少, 减缓放慢

translation: v. 松弛, 下陷, 下垂, (物价)下跌, 漂流
example: The branch sagged under the weight of the apples. 树枝被苹果压弯了。

translation: v. 嗽口, (用清水)刷, 冲洗掉, 漂净
example: Let me just rinse my hands. 让我冲个手。

translation: v. 损害
example: Strategic policy during the War was vitiated because of a sharp division between easterners and westerners. 由于“东方人”和“西方人”间的巨大分歧，战争期间的战略方针没有得到切实的执行。

translation: v. 唆使
example: an attempt to suborn a witness 收买证人的企图

translation: v. 缩小
example: The elephant population is dwindling. 大象的数量在减少。

translation: v. 贪婪且出声响地吃喝
v. 探查
example: I don’t want to pry , but I need to ask you one or two questions. 我不想唐突，不过我需要问你一两个问题。

translation: v. 探险, 探测, 探究
example: Management need to explore ways of improving office security. 管理层需要探讨如何加强办事处的安全措施。

translation: v. 淌口水
example: I hate dogs that slobber everywhere. 我讨厌到处淌口水的狗。

translation: v. 逃避
v. 腾出, 空出,离(职),退(位)
example: Clay will vacate the position on June 19. 克莱将于6月19日离职。

translation: v. 提出
example: At any point in the project where you don't interpose your own judgment, your people are more likely to make a mistake. So what? 在项目中任何你没有提出自己看法的地方，你的手下都更容易犯错。

translation: v. 提供
example: the proffered invitation 提出的邀请

translation: v. 添加, 双重
example: The image of a seemingly tiny dancer was superimposed on the image of the table. 一个看似很小的舞蹈者的影像被叠加在了那张桌子的影像上。

translation: v. 填满

translation: v. 调解
example: They asked my father to intercede with the king on their behalf. 他们请我父亲代他们向国王求情。

translation: v. 调用
example: Should anyone be allowed to invoke any service? 是否允许任何人调用任何服务？

translation: v. 跳动
example: He felt suddenly faint, and his heart began to palpitate. 他突然感到晕厥，心脏也开始悸动。

translation: v. 停止, 结束, 终止

translation: v. 通电流于, 电镀
v. 同步
example: It was virtually impossible to synchronize our lives so as to take vacations and weekends together. 为了一起度假和过周末而要让我们的生活同步几乎是不可能的。

translation: v. 同意, 加入, 同意
v. 痛击
example: We were trounced 13-0. 我们以0比13惨败。

translation: v. 偷窃, 盗取
example: He must have purloined a key from somewhere. 他肯定是从哪里偷了一把钥匙。

translation: v. 偷听

translation: v. 突出

translation: v. 突然转向

translation: v. 涂抹
example: soldiers’ faces daubed with black mud 抹了黑泥的士兵的脸

translation: v. 涂上, 抹掉, 涂污, 诽谤, 抹去

translation: v. 涂污, 污损(名誉等), 把(界线,视线等)弄得模糊不清, 弄污

translation: v. 吐出
example: Cars drew up to disgorge a wedding party. 一辆辆轿车开过来，下来的都是参加婚宴的人。

translation: v. 推断, [数]外推
example: Extrapolating from his latest findings, he reckons about 80% of these deaths might be attributed to smoking. 从他最近的发现推断，他估计大约80%的这类死亡可能归因于吸烟。

translation: v. 推进
example: The new resort area has boosted tourism. 新的度假区促进了旅游业的发展。

translation: v. 退步
example: At present the moral belief crisis is the co-existence of expansibility crisis and the retrogress crisis. 当前道德信仰危机是发展性危机与倒退性危机并存。

example: Who smile and frown, wince and hiss. 他们微笑和皱眉，畏缩与嘶嘘。

translation: v. 退位, 放弃(职位,权力等)

translation: v. 挖掘, 开凿, 挖出, 挖空
