translation: v. 玩弄, 戏弄, 延误
v. 玩耍, 娱乐
example: ...the rich and famous disporting themselves in glamorous places. ...明星富豪们在豪宅中自娱自乐。

translation: v. 危害
example: large-scale military offensives which could jeopardize the UN peace process 可能会破坏联合国和平进程的大规模军事进攻

translation: v. 偎依
example: Jane snuggled up against his shoulder. 简依偎在他的肩膀上。

translation: v. 违反抵触
example: Some portions of the bill may contravene state law. 这项议案中的一些部分可能与州法律相抵触。

translation: v. 伪造
example: The file was altered to falsify the evidence. 文件被动了手脚，以此伪造证据。

translation: v. 伪装
example: The strain she was under was well camouflaged by skilful make-up. 巧妙的化妆很好地掩盖了她紧张的心情。

translation: v. 委托
example: He entrusted his cash to a business partner for investment in a series of projects. 他把现款委托给一个生意合伙人投资一系列项目。

translation: v. 委托
example: A subcommittee was deputed to investigate the claims. 一个委员会专门小组受托去核实索赔事宜。

translation: v. 慰问
example: We condole with you on your misfortune. 我们对您的不幸表示慰问。

translation: v. 稳步前进, 铸造, 伪造
example: Someone stole my credit card and forged my signature. 有人偷了我的信用卡，并假冒我的签名。

translation: v. 无效
example: The election results were nullified because of voter fraud. 由于选票造假，选举结果被宣布无效。

translation: v. 物化
v. 吸收
example: She had imbibed the traditions of her family. 她受到了自己家庭传统的影响。

translation: v. 吸收
example: It will take time to assimilate all these facts. 充分掌握所有这些情况需要时间。

translation: v. 吸吮
v. 吸引
example: The allure and charm of Paris excite all who visit there. 巴黎的诱惑与魅力吸引了所有到此游玩的人。

translation: v. 洗擦, 擦净, 使(气体)净化, 擦洗
example: She was on her hands and knees scrubbing the floor. 她正趴着擦地板。

translation: v. 细读
example: She leant forward to peruse the document more closely. 她俯身向前，更仔细地读那份文件。

translation: v. 细细考虑
v. 下沉, 沉淀, 平息, 减退, 衰减
example: After the heavy rains, part of the road subsided. 大雨过后，部分路面塌陷了。

translation: v. 先占
example: The law would preempt stronger local rules. 该法律将预先制止更强硬的地方性法规。

translation: v. 闲荡, 虚度, 徘徊
example: Five or six teenagers were loitering in front of the newsagent’s. 五六个青少年在报摊前面游荡。

translation: v. 闲谈
example: Did you hear his frenzied tattle? 你听见这疯狂的闲谈了吗？

translation: v. 相称
example: His conduct did not comport with his high position. 他的所作所为与他的高级职务不相称。

translation: v. 相互影响
example: The answer lies, yet again, in the interplay of population and technology. 原因又一次在于人口和科技的相互影响。

translation: v. 详论
example: Sing a descant on a main tune or melody. 以主调或悦耳的音调唱着评论。

translation: v. 详审
example: Police are sifting through the evidence. 警方在筛查证据。

translation: v. 详细说明, 解释
example: Schmidt continued to expound his views on economics and politics. 施密特继续阐释他关于经济与政治的观点。

translation: v. 享受
example: Disclosure: This reporter also lives in New Haven and has heard Chua regale friends with parenting stories. 揭秘：记者也住在纽海文，曾经听过蔡在餐桌上分享育儿故事。

translation: v. 消除
example: This is its chance to slake the insecurities built during the isolationist years of the Cultural Revolution. 这是它消除文革期间那段孤立主义岁月所造成的不安全感的机会。

translation: v. 消除
example: Staff use the poison to exterminate moles and rabbits. 员工用毒药来消灭鼹鼠和野兔。

translation: v. 校准
example: ...instructions on how to calibrate a thermometer. …校准温度计的说明。

translation: v. 协调
example: How well all her garments harmonized with each other. 她所有的衣服彼此配起来是多么地协调。

translation: v. 胁迫
example: Attempts to intimidate her failed. 恐吓她的企图失败了。

translation: v. 斜视
example: He also seems to be slightly blinded by the sun, causing him to squint. 他似乎也被强烈的太阳光照的有点睁不开眼睛，导致有点斜视的样子。

translation: v. 泄漏(秘密), 胡扯
example: Her mistake was to blab about their affair. 她的错误在于泄露了他们的风流韵事。

translation: v. 心满意足
v. 新生
example: They hope to revitalize the neighborhood by providing better housing. 他们希望通过提供更好的住房条件使这个社区恢复活力。

translation: v. 幸运
v. 修补
example: Many older companies are revamping their image. 很多老牌公司都在更新公司形象。

translation: v. 修饰
example: The boat was embellished with carvings in red and blue. 这艘船饰有红、蓝雕刻。

translation: v. 羞辱, 使丢脸, 耻辱
example: Her boss humiliated her in front of all her colleagues. 她的老板在所有同事面前羞辱了她。

translation: v. 序列改变
v. 叙述
example: He then recounted the story of the interview for his first job. 他然后叙述了有关他第一份工作面试的故事。

translation: v. 宣扬
example: television’s failure to publicize the unemployment issue 电视未能报道失业问题

translation: v. 削弱
example: The illness had impaired his ability to think and concentrate. 这种疾病损害了他的思维能力和注意力。

translation: v. 削弱
example: The hot sun enervated her to the point of collapse. 热辣辣的太阳把她晒得快要晕过去了。

translation: v. 削弱
example: an attenuated form of the polio virus 脊髓灰质炎减毒病毒

translation: v. 巡行
example: According to traditions, the selectmen are required by law to perambulate the bounds every five years. 根据传统法律要求市镇行政管理委员会成员每隔五年巡视边界一次。

translation: v. 压制
example: Her creativity had been squelched. 她的创造力受到了压制。

translation: v. 压制
v. 压制
v. 呀呀学语, 喋喋不休, 作潺潺声, 泄露(秘密)
example: Momma babbled on and on about how he was ruining me. 妈妈喋喋不休地数说他在如何毁我。

translation: v. 淹没
v. 淹没
example: The tidal wave inundated vast areas of cropland. 海啸淹没了大片农田。

translation: v. 延迟, 耽搁
example: People often procrastinate when it comes to paperwork. 遇到文书工作，人们常常会拖拖拉拉。

translation: v. 延长
example: Delay always breeds danger; and to protract a great design is often to ruin it. 推迟经常孕育危险；拖延一个伟大的工程常常意味着毁灭它。

translation: v. 严惩
v. 研磨成粉
example: The seeds can be used whole or pulverized into flour. 这些籽可以完整使用，或者磨成粉末。

translation: v. 掩饰
example: Her pleasant manner belied her true character. 她讨人喜欢的举止掩饰了她真实的个性。

translation: v. 掩饰, 假装, 装糊涂
example: This man was too injured to dissimulate well. 这个男人伤得太重，不可能掩盖得住。

translation: v. 掩饰, 假装不知道
example: Henry was not slow to dissemble when it served his purposes. 形势一对他有利，亨利就马上开始隐瞒。

translation: v. 佯装
example: She’s not ill, she’s only shamming. 她没生病，只是在装病。

translation: v. 侥幸成功, 意外受挫
example: As recently as a year ago people wondered whether M-PESA’s success was a fluke. 最近一年来，人们开始产生怀疑，是否M-PESA的成功只是一种侥幸。

translation: v. 摇摆
example: A good pay package and a company car were dangled in front of her. 优厚的薪酬和公司配车摆在她面前。

translation: v. 摇晃
example: We jolted along rough wet roads through an endless banana plantation. 我们沿崎岖潮湿的公路颠簸着驶过无边无际的香蕉种植园。

translation: v. 摇晃, 蹒跚, 交错, 摇摇摆摆
example: He managed to stagger home. 他好不容易才蹒跚着走回家。

translation: v. 咬, 啃, 啮, 使苦恼, 消耗, 折磨, 侵蚀
example: Dexter gnawed his pen thoughtfully. 德克斯特若有所思地咬着钢笔。

translation: v. 一口气喝干, 大口地喝
v. 移动
example: She leaned on the door, but it wouldn’t budge. 她靠在门上，但是门纹丝不动。

translation: v. 引爆
example: France is expected to detonate its first nuclear device in the next few days. 预计法国将在未来几天内引爆它的第一个核装置。

translation: v. 引诱
example: He lured her to his home and shot her with his father's gun. 他把她诱骗到家里，然后用父亲的枪把她打死。

translation: v. 拥抱
example: Dawn and her boyfriend were cuddling on the sofa. 唐和她的男朋友在沙发上搂搂抱抱。

translation: v. 拥挤, 卷缩, 草率从事, 挤作一团
example: We lay huddled together for warmth. 我们紧紧挤在一起取暖。

translation: v. 涌出
example: All that pent-up frustration gushed out in a torrent of abuse. 所有压抑着的失望与不快通过一阵痛骂全都发泄了出来。

translation: v. 优秀, 胜过他人
example: You have excelled yourself with the new exhibition. 你新办的这次展览特别成功。

translation: v. 犹豫, 不知是否应
example: We shouldn't boggle at this opportunity to make a profit. 对这个赚钱的机会我们不应犹豫。

translation: v. 犹豫不定
example: She vacillates between men twice her age and men younger than she. 她在两个男人之间摇摆不定，一个年龄比她大一倍，一个比她小。

translation: v. 游手好闲, 混日子
v. 有浓味
v. 有助于
example: The success in the Middle East redounds to his benefit. 中东地区的该项成就对他有益。

translation: v. 诱捕
example: The spider must wait for prey to be ensnared on its web. 蜘蛛一定要耐心等待，直到猎物被它的蛛网困住。

translation: v. 诱惑, 诱使
example: He tries to counterfeit all the good things God offers you, aiming at our weakness in order to exploit our vulnerabilities and entice us into the darkness. 他试图假冒所有上帝提供给我们的好事情，针对我们的弱点，以便开发我们的缺点，诱使我们进入黑暗。

translation: v. 诱骗
example: She inveigles Paco into a plot to swindle Tania out of her savings. 她把帕科诱骗进了一个骗取塔尼娅积蓄的阴谋里。

translation: v. 诱使
example: The head lecturer was sacked for seducing female students. 这个首席讲师因诱奸女学生而被解雇。

translation: v. 愚弄
v. 预订
example: Today's events bespeak a bright future. 今天的事件预示着一个美好的未来。

translation: v. 预示
example: The wall through Berlin was finally ruptured, prefiguring the reunification of Germany. 柏林墙终于倒塌了，预示着德国的重新统一。

translation: v. 预示
example: strange events that portend disaster 预示着灾难的奇怪事件

translation: v. 预示
example: She says the way the bill was passed bodes ill for democracy. 她说议案通过的方式预示民主的恶运。

translation: v. 预示, 预言, 预兆, 预感
example: can be, if I forebode aright, no power, short of the Divine mercy, to disclose, whether by uttered words, or by type or emblem, the secrets that may be buried with a human heart. 如果我的预感不错的话，除去上天的仁慈，没有什么力量，无论是通过讲出来的语言或是任何形式的标志，能够揭示可能埋在一个人心里的秘密。

translation: v. 预言
example: Unfortunately, I am not able to prognosticate how everything will eventually shake out. 不幸的是，我无法预言每件事的最终结果将会怎样。

translation: v. 预言, 预告
v. 赞美
v. 造成
example: In such circumstances, governments must do all they can to create and engender trust among its nation’s constituents and institutions. 在这种情况下，政府必须尽其所能在它的国家选民和公共机构之间创造和产生信任。

translation: v. 责备
example: His mother summoned him, upbraided him, wept and prayed. 他母亲把他叫来，责骂了他。然后母亲哭着做了祷告。

translation: v. 责备
example: "There's no call for talk like that," Mrs. Evans reproved him. “没有必要说那种话，”埃文斯太太责备他道。

translation: v. 责备
example: She is quick to reproach anyone who doesn't live up to her own high standards. 她动不动就指责达不到她高标准的人。

translation: v. 责难
example: He was officially censured for his handling of the situation. 他因对这个情况处理不当而受到严厉批评。

translation: v. 增加, 增大
example: Any surplus was sold to augment their income. 所有多余的东西被售卖一空来增加他们的收入。

translation: v. 增生扩散
example: Computer courses continue to proliferate. 计算机课程层出不穷。

translation: v. 诈骗
example: A businessman swindled investors out of millions of dollars. 一位商人骗走了投资者数百万美元。

translation: v. 招致
example: The government had also incurred huge debts. 政府也已承受了大笔债务。

translation: v. 照射
example: ...the Chernobyl disaster, which irradiated large parts of Europe. ...辐射了欧洲大部的切尔诺贝利灾难。

translation: v. 折叠
v. 折回
example: After a few minutes, he turned around and began to retrace his steps. 几分钟后，他转身顺着原路返回。

translation: v. 折旧, (使)贬值, 降低, 贬低, 轻视
example: New cars depreciate in value quickly. 新车掉价很快。

translation: v. 振荡
example: The associated cross-peak amplitude also appears to oscillate. 相关的交叉峰的幅度也在振荡。

translation: v. 镇压
example: Troops eventually quelled the unrest. 部队最终镇压了动乱。

translation: v. 争价
example: Ella showed her the best places to go for a good buy, and taught her how to haggle with used furniture dealers. 埃拉告诉她买便宜货的最佳去处，还教她怎样与二手家具商讨价还价。

translation: v. 争论
example: Mother is devoted to Dad although they squabble all the time. 妈妈深爱着爸爸，虽然他们总是为琐事争吵。

translation: v. 征服
example: Police managed to subdue the angry crowd. 警察设法控制住了愤怒的人群。

translation: v. 征募, 谋取(支持、赞助等), 应募, 赞助, 支持, 征召, 参军
v. 正视
example: You must envisage realities. 你必须正视现实。

translation: v. 证明
example: Police records attest to his long history of violence. 警方记录证明他有长期的暴力史。

translation: v. 证明, 证实, 作证
example: Mr Molto has agreed to testify at the trial. 莫尔托先生已经同意出庭作证。

translation: v. 支付
example: The aid will not be disbursed until next year. 援助款项到明年才能拨出。

translation: v. 支吾搪塞
example: ‘I’m not sure,’ he prevaricated. “我不肯定。”他支支吾吾道。

translation: v. 直译
example: If SNS wants to press the meaning of its metaphrase " social network serves " for, the history should be quite long. SNS假如要按它直译的意思“社会网络服务”来说，历史应该相当悠久。

translation: v. 窒息
example: A teenage mother was accused of smothering her 3-month-old daughter. 一个少女妈妈被指控闷死自己三个月大的女儿。

translation: v. 中断
v. 中伤
v. 终止
example: We hope that the military regime will desist from its acts of violence. 我们希望军人政权停止暴力行为。

translation: v. 重步行走, 踏, 践, 践踏
example: They put on their coats and tramped through the falling snow. 他们穿上大衣，在落雪中脚步沉重地缓缓走着。

translation: v. 重读, 强调, 着重强调
example: The photograph seemed to accentuate his large nose. 照片似乎突出了他的大鼻子。

translation: v. 重述要点, 概括, 摘要
example: Let's just recapitulate the essential points. 让我们只概述一下基本要点吧。

translation: v. 重新得到
v. 重新点燃
example: The trial has rekindled painful memories of the war. 这场审判又唤起了人们对战争的痛苦回忆。

translation: v. 重整旗鼓, 给予新力量, (使)恢复健康, 力量, 决心, 集结
example: After a shaky start, he rallied and won the title in style. 虽然开局不顺，但他振作精神，最后漂亮地赢得了冠军。

translation: v. 主持
example: I shall be pleased to preside at your meetings. 我很高兴主持你们的会议。

translation: v. 主管, 指挥, 管理, 监督
example: Meese was to superintend the administration's entire domestic policy. 米斯要监管政府的所有国内政策。

translation: v. 注释, 评注
example: an annotated edition of ‘Othello’ 《奥赛罗》的注释本

translation: v. 转录
example: A secretary transcribed the witnesses’ statements. 一名书记员记录下证人的陈述。

translation: v. 转移
example: Henry averted his eyes as she undressed. 她脱衣服的时候，亨利把目光转向别处。

translation: v. 转移, 归入, 提交
v. 装饰
example: She had finished the vegetables and was garnishing the roast. 她已经做好了蔬菜，正给烤肉配饰菜。

translation: v. 装饰
example: His watercolour designs adorn a wide range of books. 他的水彩设计装饰着各种各样的书籍。

translation: v. 谆谆劝导
v. 拙劣地做, 弄糟
v. 滋扰
v. 自夸
example: And the LORD said unto Gideon, The people that are with thee are too many for me to give the Midianites into their hands, lest Israel vaunt themselves against me, saying, Mine own hand hath saved me. 耶和华对基甸说，跟随你的人过多，我不能将米甸人交在他们手中，免得以色列人向我夸大，说，是我们自己的手救了我们。

translation: v. 纵容
example: And, this Valentines Day, pamper yourself. 最后，这个情人节，纵容一下自己。

translation: v. 租, 租借, 出租
example: Most students rent rooms in their second year. 大多数学生到二年级时租房居住。

translation: v. 阻碍
example: He died in 1874, heavily encumbered by debt. 他于1874年去世，负债累累。

translation: v. 阻碍
v. 阻断
example: Troops could be ferried in to interdict drug shipments. 军队可以被渡运来阻断毒品运输。

translation: v. 阻隔, 阻塞, 遮断(道路、通道等)
example: A small aircraft was obstructing the runway. 一架小型飞机堵住了跑道。

translation: v. 阻止
example: Storms at sea impeded our progress. 海上风暴阻碍了我们的航程。

translation: v. 阻止
example: The company’s financial difficulties have deterred potential investors. 该公司的财务困境令潜在的投资者望而却步。

translation: v. 钻研
example: He had a considerable Elizabethan library to delve in. 他拥有相当多的伊丽莎白时期的藏书供其钻研。

translation: v. 作出公断
v. 做姿势表达, 用手势谈话
example: Jane gesticulated wildly and shouted ‘Stop! Stop!’ 简拼命打着手势，喊着“停下！停下！”

translation: vbl. drive的过去式
vbl. fall 的过去式
vbl. 洒水
example: Through faith he kept the passover, and the sprinkling of blood, lest he that destroyed the firstborn should touch them. 他因着信，就守逾越节，（守或作立）行洒血的礼，免得那灭长子的临近以色列人。

translation: v. 哄笑, 狂笑
example: We guffawed at what Graham had written. 我们对格雷厄姆写的东西狂笑不已。

translation: v. -dived, -diving （飞机）俯冲，急降
example: Sales have nosedived since January. 自1月份以来销售额骤降。

translation: v. (道路等)分叉, (意见等)分歧, 脱离
example: His interests increasingly diverged from those of his colleagues. 他和同事们的兴趣越来越不同。

translation: v. (时间)过去, 消逝
example: Several months elapsed before his case was brought to trial. 过了几个月他的案子才开审。

translation: v. (在灯下)用功, 深入研究, 专心著作
v. (在水中)挣扎, 困难地往前走, 踌躇, 发慌
example: More and more firms are floundering because of the recession. 由于经济衰退，越来越多的公司举步维艰。

translation: v. (逐步或暗中)侵占, 蚕食, 超出通常(或正常)界线
example: The new institutions do not encroach on political power. 这些新机构没有侵犯到政治权力。

translation: v. [医]生脓, 化脓, 流脓
example: Left untreated, the abscesses suppurate ; the pus cannot escape from the body, and the malady spreads throughout the organism. 将其置之脑后，而脓肿仍在化脓，其浓液不可能不侵入身体，这种疼痛（）布了整个有机体。

translation: v. <美口>夸张地作为, 表现感情
example: Siskind encourages the children to emote to the music as they dance. 西斯金德鼓励孩子们跳舞时要根据音乐表现出情感。

translation: v. <俗>豪饮
v. 暗指, 影射, 间接提到
example: With friends, she sometimes alluded to a feeling that she herself was to blame for her son's predicament. 和朋友们一起时，她有时暗示她感到儿子的困境要怪她自己。

translation: v. 跋涉
v. 备办食物, 满足(需要), 投合
example: We cater to an exclusive clientele. 我们满足一个特殊客户群的需求。

translation: v. 背离, 偏离
example: They stopped you as soon as you deviated from the script. 你一偏离剧本，他们就会叫停。

translation: v. 变成石灰质, 钙化
v. 变动, 波动, 涨落, 上下, 动摇
example: Insect populations fluctuate wildly from year to year. 昆虫的数量每年变化很大。

translation: v. 变宽厚, 变温和
example: At last her father relented and came to visit her. 最后她父亲的态度软化，去看了她。

translation: v. 变小, 亏缺, 衰落, 退潮, 消逝, 呈下弦
example: My enthusiasm for the project was waning. 我对这个项目的热情逐渐减退了。

translation: v. 辩护, 恳求
example: ‘Don’t go!’ Robert pleaded. “别走！”罗伯特央求道。

translation: v. 搏动, 跳动, 有规律的跳动
example: I could see the veins in his neck pulsating. 我看到他颈部的血管在跳动。

translation: v. 不付赌金而溜掉, 逃避履行义务, 食言
example: He welshed on his agreement with the team that he would play for them in February. 他逃避履行他与球队合同中在二月为他们踢球的协议。

translation: v. 不稳地滑动
example: A snake slithered across the grass. 一条蛇蜿蜒爬过草丛。

translation: v. 缠结, 混乱, 吠, 咆哮, 怒骂
example: ‘Shut up,’ he snarled. “住口。”他怒吼道。

translation: v. 撤退, 退却
example: The rebels retreated to the mountains. 叛乱分子撤退到山区。

translation: v. 吃吃地笑, 窃笑
example: Suddenly, three schoolkids sitting near me started sniggering. 突然，坐在我身边的3个学童偷偷地笑了起来。

translation: v. 串通, 勾结, 共谋
example: Several local officials are in jail on charges of colluding with the Mafia. 几位地方官员因涉嫌串通黑手党而锒铛入狱。

translation: v. 闯入, 侵入
example: The press has been blamed for intruding into people's personal lives in an unacceptable way. 新闻媒体因以一种令人无法接受的方式侵入人们的私生活而受到谴责。

translation: v. 打滚, <喻>沉迷, 颠簸
example: hippos wallowing in the mud 在泥浆中打滚的河马

translation: v. 盗用公款, 挪用公款, 贪污
v. 斗嘴, 流动, 闪动
example: I went into medicine to care for patients, not to waste time bickering over budgets. 我从医是为了治病救人，不是为了预算争吵而浪费时间。

translation: v. 对酌, 共饮, (亲切)交谈
example: This gave Bill an opportunity to hobnob with the company's president, board chairman, and leading executives. 这给了比尔一个与该公司总裁、董事长及主管经理厮混的机会。

translation: v. 多, 大量存在, 富于, 充满
example: Rumours abound as to the reasons for his resignation. 有关他辞职的原因有各种各样的谣传。

translation: v. 发出尖而高的声音, 吱吱叫鸣
v. 发芽, 抽芽, 充满, 成长, 发展, 产生
v. 非常高兴, 欢跃
v. 干涉, 干预, 插入, 介入, (指时间)介于其间
example: The army will have to intervene to prevent further fighting. 军队将不得不干预以阻止进一步的战斗。

translation: v. 干预, 玩弄, 贿赂, 损害, 削弱, 篡改
example: I don't want to be accused of tampering with the evidence. 我不想被指控篡改证据。

translation: v. 咯咯笑
example: Harry chortled with delight. 哈里高兴地哈哈大笑。

translation: v. 跟着发生, 继起
example: If the Europeans did not reduce subsidies, a trade war would ensue. 如果欧洲不减少补贴，贸易战将随即爆发。

translation: v. 勾引, 拉皮条
v. 鬼鬼祟祟做事
v. 跪下
example: Tom knelt down and patted the dog. 汤姆跪下来轻轻拍了拍那只狗。

translation: vi. 过剩, 有余
v. 缓行, 溜蹄
v. 毁灭, 死亡, 腐烂, 枯萎
example: Hundreds perished when the ship went down. 轮船沉没，数百人罹难。

translation: v. 昏聩, 溺爱
example: He dotes on his nine-year-old son. 他对自己9岁的儿子十分溺爱。

translation: v. 混时间, 闲荡, 涂鸦
example: He looked across at Jackson, doodling on his notebook. 他一边看着对面的杰克逊，一边在笔记本上信手涂鸦。

translation: v. 急促而不清楚地说话, 七嘴八嘴地说, 喋喋不休地说
example: Just calm down, stop gabbling, and tell me what has happened. 冷静一下，说话别太急，告诉我发生了什么事。

translation: v. 急赶, 急跑, 急转, 以轻快而交替的步子走动
example: People were scurrying off to work. 人们急匆匆赶着去上班。

translation: v. 坚持, 遵守
example: Above all, everyone must abide by the law. 首要的是，每个人都必须遵守法律。

translation: v. 渐渐康复, 渐愈
example: After two weeks, I was allowed home, where I convalesced for three months. 2星期后，我经允许回家静养，在家康复了3个月。

translation: v. 均质化
example: plans to homogenize the various school systems 统一各类不同学制的计划

translation: v. 看守, 监考
example: Different is, the exam in the life often does not have person invigilate. 不同的是，生活中的考试常常是没有人监考的。

translation: v. 渴望, 想念, 怀念, 向往
example: He yearned for freedom. 他曾渴望自由。

translation: v. 渴望, 追求
example: I hankered after a floor-length brown suede coat. 我渴望一件垂地长度的棕色麂皮大衣。

translation: v. 狂热地描述, 写狂想文, 作狂想曲
example: The critics rhapsodized over her performance in "Autumn Sonata." 评论家对于她在《秋日奏鸣曲》中的表演大加赞赏。

translation: v. 溃烂, 发炎, 怨恨
v. 扩大, 详述, 膨胀
example: dilated pupils 扩大的瞳孔

translation: v. 流行, 盛行, 获胜, 成功
example: Justice will prevail. 正义终将获胜。

translation: v. 流口水, 说昏话
example: The dog was drooling at the mouth. 那狗嘴上流着口水。

translation: v. 流浪, 缓行
v. 乱窜, 猛冲, (车等)颠簸, 沸腾作用
v. 落下
example: A thrush alighted on a branch of the pine tree. 一只画眉落在这棵松树的一根树枝上。

translation: v. 冒泡, [化]泡腾, 兴奋
v. 秘密而匆忙地移居, 撤营, 逃走, 逃亡
example: The company is decamping to Asia with 1,700 jobs. 这家公司带着1,700份工作正逃往亚洲。

translation: v. 默许, 勉强同意
example: Steve seemed to acquiesce in the decision. 斯蒂夫看样子默许了这个决定。

translation: v. 默许, 纵容, 暗中合作, 密谋策划
example: They connived with their mother to deceive me. 他们与他们的母亲串通来骗我。

translation: v. 牛拉车, 艰苦跋涉
example: ...trekking through the jungles. …徒步穿越丛林。

translation: v. 趴, 匍匐, 卑躬屈膝, 五体投地的
example: I saw him grovelling in the road for his hat. 我看到他趴在路上找帽子。

translation: v. 盘坐
v. 蹒跚, 踉跄, 动摇, 摇摇欲坠
example: Lorrimer swayed a little, tottered, and fell. 洛里默身体微微摇晃，蹒跚几步后跌倒在地。

translation: v. 碰撞, 抵触
example: A car and a van collided on the motorway. 一辆汽车和一辆小型货车在高速公路上相撞了。

translation: v. 批判, 非难
example: Doubt and animadvert are inner motive force of innovation of science and culture. 怀疑和批判是促进科学与文化不断创新的内推力。

translation: v. 谦逊, 屈尊
example: When he condescended to speak, he contradicted himself three or four times in the space of half an hour. 当他屈尊讲话时，半小时内有三四次前后矛盾。

translation: v. 潜逃, 避债
example: He was ordered to appear the following day, but absconded. 他被传唤于第二天出庭，却逃跑了。

translation: v. 憔悴, 凋萎, 衰退, 苦思
v. 倾听
example: Give ye ear, and hear my voice; hearken, and hear my speech. 你们当侧耳听我的声音，留心听我的言语。

translation: v. 求助, 诉诸, 采取(某种手段等), 常去
example: His punishing work schedule had made him resort to drugs. 他那累人的工作日程已经使他不得不求助于毒品了。

translation: v. 屈服, 屈从, 死
example: Don't succumb to the temptation to have just one cigarette. 不要屈服于只抽一支烟的诱惑。

translation: v. 屈尊
example: Travis called after her, but she didn’t deign to answer. 特拉维斯在后面叫她，但她不肯屈尊应一声。

translation: v. 趋向, 往往是
example: People tend to need less sleep as they get older. 随着年龄的增长，人需要的睡眠通常会减少。

translation: v. 蜷缩, 蹲伏
example: He crouched in the shadows near the doorway. 他蹲在门道近旁的阴暗处。

translation: v. 劝诫, 忠告
example: I expostulate with her on the impropriety. 因行为不当我向她提出告诫。

translation: v. 撒尿, 鬼混, 游荡
v. 散发, 发出, 发源
example: Intelligence and cunning emanated from him. 聪明和机灵从他身上散发出来。

translation: v. 晒太阳(享受温暖), 感到温暖, 愉快或舒适
example: All through the hot, still days of their holiday Amy basked in the sun. 在整个炎热、寂静的假期里埃米都在晒太阳。

translation: v. 闪身, 急转, 逃走
example: He jinked left, then right, throwing the plane into sudden turns. 他突然向左，然后向右，使飞机猛地旋转起来。

translation: v. 闪烁, 焕发
example: What kind of mood can let person mind coruscate? 什么样心情可以让人精神焕发?。

translation: v. 慎重的打球, 妨碍, 阻碍
v. 食言, 违例出牌
example: He reneged on a promise to leave his wife. 他背弃了诺言，离开了他的妻子。

translation: v. 舒适地坐定, 偎依
example: Sarah lay there peacefully, the child nestling by her side. 萨拉安静地躺在那儿，孩子偎依在她身边。

translation: v. 顺从, 答应, 遵守
example: The newspaper was asked by federal agents for assistance and agreed to comply. 联邦探员要求这家报社给予协助，报社同意配合。

translation: v. 说孩子气的话, 说半截话, 闲聊, 胡说, 唠叨
example: Lou prattled on about various trivialities till I wanted to scream. 卢就各种琐碎小事唠叨个没完，一直到我烦得都想尖叫了。

translation: v. 说模棱两可的话, 支吾
example: He is equivocating a lot about what is going to happen if and when there are elections. 他含含糊糊地说着很多如果进行选举会发生的状况。

translation: v. 私奔, 潜逃, 出走
example: My parents didn’t approve of the marriage, so we eloped. 我父母不赞成这桩婚事，所以我们就私奔了。

translation: v. 死亡, 消逝, 平息, 渴望, 漠然, 熄灭
example: He died in 1985 at the age of 76. 他1985年去世，终年76岁。

translation: v. 探听, 调查, 偷窃
example: Ricardo was the one she'd seen snooping around Kim's hotel room. 里卡多就是她曾见过的在金的旅馆房间里到处窥探的那个人。

translation: v. 逃避, 推卸
example: He was fired for shirking. 他因偷懒被解雇了。

translation: v. 提出异议, 反对, 抗辩, 犹豫
example: They demurred politely, but finally agreed to stay. 他们礼貌地推却，但最后还是同意留下。

translation: v. 挑剔, 找错
v. 通奸
example: One of the soldiers chance upon a girl from a mysterious tribe, that is cursed such that its members who fornicate with outsiders will, together with them, transform into wolves. 一个士兵偶然发现了一个来自神奇部落的女孩，这个部落遭到诅咒，如果它的成员和其他部落人私通，和他们在一起，就会变成狼。

translation: v. 统治, 支配, 盛行, 占优势
example: For several minutes confusion reigned . 有好几分钟场面大乱。

translation: v. 偷偷隐躲, 偷懒
example: You, meanwhile, will be skulking in the safety of the car. 与此同时，你会安全地藏在汽车里。

translation: v. 推测, 思索, 做投机买卖
example: She refused to speculate. 她拒绝猜测。

translation: v. 推托, 背叛, 自相矛盾
v. 为琐事费心, 拘泥小节
v. 畏缩, 阿谀, 奉承
example: A stray dog was cringing by the door. 一条流浪狗畏缩在门旁。

translation: v. 畏缩, 回避
example: The conflict among the interest groups is a political puzzle unable to blench for all the societies of all ages. 利益集团之间的冲突是古往今来所有社会都无法回避的政治难题。

translation: v. 畏缩, 退缩
example: The hostages cowered in their seats. 这些人质蜷缩在其座位上。

translation: v. 畏缩, 退缩, 畏首畏尾
example: Leo stared back at him without flinching. 利奥毫不畏缩地回瞪着他。

translation: v. 呜咽, 哀诉
example: He heard the dog whimper. 他听到狗在呜咽。

translation: v. 下来, 下降, 遗传(指财产,气质,权利), 突击, 出其不意的拜访
example: Our plane started to descend. 我们的飞机开始下降。

translation: v. 闲聊, 胡扯
example: Keeping things short and sweet not only shows people that you are concise and don't waffle, but that you also know what you want. 亲切简洁的语言彰显了你简明的个性，不仅不会被误认为是在胡扯，还让对方知道你是一个了解自己想要什么的人。

translation: v. 显现, 浮现, 暴露, 形成, (由某种状态)脱出, (事实)显现出来
example: The flowers emerge in the spring. 花儿在春天开放。

translation: v. 向内破裂, 爆炸
example: The windows on both sides of the room had imploded. 房间两边的窗户都向内爆碎了。

translation: v. 性交, 交配, 交尾
example: During the time she is paired to a male, the female allows no other males to copulate with her. 雌性与一雄性配对时，雌性不允许其他雄性与其交配。

translation: v. 旋转, 不停地转动
example: The dancers gyrated wildly to the beat of the music. 舞蹈员随着音乐的节奏疯狂地旋转起舞。

translation: v. 迅速地移动或奔跑
v. 一致, 符合
example: The interests of the US and those of the islanders may not coincide. 美国的利益和这些岛民的利益可能并不一致。

translation: v. 以重量胜过, 占优势, 超过, 胜过
v. 溢出, 流出
vi. 溢出, 满出
example: Water overbrim med the vessel. 水从容器中溢出来了。

translation: v. 永久(使)移居
example: He emigrated to Belgium. 他移民去了比利时。

translation: v. 有条件投降, 认输, 屈服, 让步, 停止抵抗
example: Helen finally capitulated and let her son have a car. 海伦最终让步，同意让儿子买一辆车。

translation: v. 郁积, 闷烧
example: What is your brand of charismatic smolder? 你的超凡魅力闷烧是什么牌子？

translation: v. 粘附, 胶着, 坚持
example: But this means they cannot always adhere to the strict codes of practice dictated in UN headquarters. 但是这就意味着它们无法总是坚持联合国总部规定的严格的实践规章。

translation: v. 争论, 争吵, 口角
example: The two sides have spent most of their time wrangling over procedural problems. 双方花了大部分的时间争论程序上的一些问题。

translation: v. 正式脱离或退出, 分离
example: Singapore seceded from the Federation of Malaysia and became an independent sovereign state. 新加坡脱离马来西亚联邦成为一个独立的主权国家。

translation: v. 制定法律
example: Most member countries have already legislated against excessive overtime. 大部分成员国已经立法禁止过度加班。

translation: v. 窒息
example: Three people were asphyxiated in the crush for last week's train. 三个人为了赶上周的火车窒息在人群中。

translation: v. 逐步升高, 逐步增强
example: The costs were escalating alarmingly. 成本在以惊人的速度增长。

translation: v. 逐渐消失
v. 转向, (风向)顺(时针)转
example: The plane veered off course. 飞机偏离了航线。

translation: v. 装病
example: He accused Frank of malingering. 他指责弗兰克装病逃避工作。

translation: v. 追逐女人, 玩弄女性, 调情
v. 自然增加, 产生
example: Interest will accrue until payment is made. 利息将会累计增加，直至付清款项。

translation: v. 足够, 有能力
example: A light lunch will suffice . 简单的午餐就够了。

translation: v. 作呕, 产生恶感, 厌恶
example: The smell of frying nauseated her. 油炸味道让她恶心。

translation: v. 坐立不安, 烦躁, 慌张, (不安地或心不在焉地)弄, 玩弄
example: The kids had started to fidget. 孩子们开始坐立不安起来。

translation: v. （不以人作主语的）使容易, 使便利, 推动, 帮助, 使容易, 促进
example: The new airport will facilitate the development of tourism. 新机场将促进旅游业的发展。

translation: v. (常用被动语态)使挨饿, <古>使饿死
vt. （除医学外现罕用的）刺, 刺痛, 撕裂
v. (古希腊)贝壳放逐法, 放逐, 排斥
example: She claims she's being ostracized by some members of her local community. 她声称遭到自己所在社区的一些成员排斥。

translation: v. (鸟)用嘴整理, 打扮, 赞扬
example: 50% of men under 35 spend at least 20 minutes preening themselves every morning in the bathroom. 50%的35岁以下男性每天早上至少花20分钟在盥洗室精心打扮。

translation: v. (使)成层
example: We currently use a large repository of data from our operational systems to help us stratify, or classify, members. 目前，我们使用我们业务系统的一个大型数据存储库来帮助我们对会员进行分层或分类。

translation: v. (使)分解, (使)碎裂
example: The plane just disintegrated in mid-air. 飞机就在半空中解体了。

translation: v. (使)快速转动, 捻弄
example: Bonnie twirled her empty glass in her fingers. 邦妮用手指转动着她的空杯子。

translation: v. (使)脱水
example: The substance is dehydrated and stored as powder. 该物质经脱水处理后以粉末形式储存。

translation: v. (书面语) 招致, 产生, 引起
example: Hunger begets crime. 饥饿滋生犯罪。

translation: v. (为乐器)调音, 使合调, 使相合
v. (尤指动物)吞吃, 狼吞虎咽, 挥霍, (火灾等)毁灭, 破坏, 吞没, 贪看, 贪听
example: The boys devoured their pancakes. 男孩子们狼吞虎咽地把薄煎饼吃了。

translation: v. [古]诅咒(主要用于温和的诅咒), 该死!
v. [化][心]使升华, 使高尚
example: He could try to sublimate the problem by writing, in detail, about it. 他可以通过详细记述而尝试使人们正视该问题。

translation: v. [律] 逐出法庭, 剥夺律师资格
example: Roy learns that his political opponents plan to disbar him for an ethical lapse, but he vows to remain a lawyer until he dies. 罗伊了解到他的政治对手他计划夺取律师资格的伦理失效，但他发誓要留一名律师，直到他去世。

translation: v. [律]控告, 检举, <主美>弹劾, 怀疑
example: The governor was impeached for using state funds improperly. 州长因违规使用州政府资金而受到弹劾。

translation: v. [律]使有效, 使生效, 确认, 证实, 验证
example: The Supreme Court has validated the lower court’s interpretation of the law. 最高法院已经认可下级法院对这条法规的阐释。

translation: vt. [现罕] 刎颈自尽, 扼杀, [医]顿挫
vt. [冶]使钝化
example: Exploit activate and passivate for transient variables to enable pooling 利用激活和钝化瞬态变量来启用池机制

translation: v. [医]热敷, 热罨, 煽动
example: They accused strike leaders of fomenting violence. 他们指责罢工领导人煽动暴力事件。

translation: v. [音]切分, [语]词中省略
v. <古>劫掠
v. <古>泄露, 暴露, 显示
v. <口>使大吃一惊, 哑然失色, 使目瞪口呆
v. <口>捉住, 逮捕, 抢夺
example: The police nabbed him for speeding. 他超速行驶被警察逮住。

translation: v. <美>[医]以醚麻醉, 化成为醚
v. <美>处电刑, 触电致死
example: Last week a housewife was electrocuted by her washing machine. 上周有个家庭主妇被洗衣机电死了。

translation: v. <美>再压, 补充加压
example: The police were widely criticized for their role in repressing the protest movement. 警方因为他们在镇压抗议活动时所扮演的角色而广受批评。

translation: vt. <主苏格兰>查出,探明搜出
v. 安慰, 藉慰
example: No one could console her when Peter died. 彼得去世时没人能够安慰她。

translation: v. 安慰, 赢得, 调和
example: efforts to conciliate the unions 对工会进行调停的努力

translation: v. 摆脱烦恼, 不受妨碍
example: How can you disencumber Oh? 怎样才可以摆脱烦恼噢?。

translation: v. 保护, 保持, 保存, 保藏
example: We must encourage the planting of new trees and preserve our existing woodlands. 我们必须鼓励栽种新树木，同时也要保护现有的林地。

translation: v. 报答, 酬谢
example: I thank you, and can but requite your good deeds with my prayers. 我感激你，只有用我的祈祷来报答你的善行。

translation: vt. 焙, 烤
v. 避开, 避免
example: a shy woman who shunned publicity 不爱抛头露面的羞怯女子

translation: v. 避开, 远避
example: I had eschewed politics in favour of a life practising law. 我选择从事律师职业，有意避开了政治。

translation: v. 编译, 编辑, 汇编
example: The document was compiled by the Department of Health. 这份文件是由卫生部汇编的。

translation: v. 鞭打, 鞭挞
v. 贬低, 降低
example: The medical profession has been debased by these revelations. 这些事被披露后，医学界的声誉受到了损害。

translation: v. 表明, 表示
example: She evinced no surprise at seeing them together. 看到他们在一起，她没有表露出惊讶。

translation: v. 并置, 并列
example: The technique Mr. Wilson uses most often is to juxtapose things for dramatic effect. 威尔逊先生最常用的技巧是把事物并列起来以获得戏剧性效果。

translation: v. 剥, 剥去
example: Strip the beds and wash the sheets. 把床单撤下来清洗。

translation: v. 剥, 削, 修, 削减, 消灭
example: The governor's campaign fund could be pared down to $500. 州长竞选活动基金可能会被削减到$500。

translation: v. 剥夺, 使失去
v. 剥夺公民权, 剥夺推举议员权, 剥夺权利
v. 剥皮
example: The person that decorticate says: 4 city gate, can attack only, attack which? 剥皮者说：四个城门，只能攻一个，攻哪个？

translation: v. 剥皮, 去皮, 抢夺, 严厉批评
example: She was well-known for flaying public officials in her daily column. 她因在每日专栏里批判政府官员而出名。

translation: v. 驳倒, 反驳
example: It was the kind of rumour that it is impossible to refute. 这是那种不可能推翻的谣言。

translation: v. 驳回, 否决, 支配, 制服
example: In 1991, the Court of Appeal overruled this decision. 1991年，上诉法院否决了此项决议。

translation: v. 簸, 扬(谷), 吹开糠皮, 吹掉, 精选
example: Administration officials have winnowed the list of candidates to three. 行政官员将候选人名单筛减到三人。

translation: v. 补偿, 赎
example: It seemed that Alice was expiating her father's sins with her charity work. 看来爱丽丝要用自己的善行来赎她父亲的罪恶。

translation: v. 不予重视
example: It would be irresponsible for me to downplay the magnitude of this crisis or assure you that everything is under control. 如果我缩小这次危机的严重性或向你们保证一切都在控制之中，就是不负责任的。

translation: v. 不再当机密文件处理, 从机密表删除
example: These reports were only declassified last year. 这些报告去年才被消密。

translation: v. 擦亮, 恢复, 磨光
v. 采用, 收养
example: Sally was adopted when she was four. 莎莉四岁时被人收养。

translation: v. 插入, 嵌入
example: He took a small key from his pocket and slowly inserted it into the lock. 他从衣袋里掏出一把小钥匙，然后缓缓地将其插入锁孔里。

translation: v. 插入水中, 把弄熄, 弄湿, 放松
v. 察觉
example: That morning, he perceived a change in Franca’s mood. 那天早上，他注意到弗兰卡情绪的变化。

translation: v. 察看, 发现, 远远看到
v. 掺杂
example: The food had been adulterated to increase its weight. 这种食物被掺了假以增加其重量。

translation: v. 产生, 发生
example: a useful technique for generating new ideas 能产生新创意的有用技术

translation: v. 阐明, 说明
example: The full picture has not yet been elucidated. 详细情况还没有解释清楚。

translation: v. 超越, 胜过
example: The desire for peace transcended political differences. 对和平的渴望超越了政治分歧。

translation: v. 超越, 胜过
example: Working hours must not exceed 42 hours a week. 工作时间每周不得超过42小时。

translation: v. 嘲弄, 嘲笑
example: You shouldn’t deride their efforts. 你不应该嘲笑他们的努力。

translation: vt. 吵吵嚷嚷地反对, 唾弃
v. 撤回, 废除, 宣告无效
example: Their work permits have been revoked. 他们的工作许可证被吊销了。

translation: v. 沉浸, 使陷入
example: The electrodes are immersed in liquid. 电极被浸没在液体中。

translation: v. 称赞, 表扬, 推荐, 委托, 吸引
example: The paper was highly commended in the UK Press Awards. 该报获得了“英国新闻奖”的高度褒奖。

translation: v. 呈递, 归还, 着色, 汇报, 致使, 放弃, 表演, 实施
example: It contained so many errors as to render it worthless. 太多的错误使之变得毫无价值。

translation: v. 冲洗, 擦亮, (搜索或追捕时)急速走遍
example: Ada was scouring out the pans. 阿达在擦锅。

translation: v. 穿上, 授予, 赋予
v. 穿透, 渗透, 看穿, 洞察
example: bullets that penetrate thick armour plating 穿过厚装甲的子弹

translation: v. 传输, 转送, 传达, 传导, 发射, 遗传, 传播
example: The US Open will be transmitted live via satellite. 美国公开赛将通过卫星现场直播。

translation: v. 刺, 戳, 刺痛, 竖起
example: Prick the sausages before you grill them. 烤之前把香肠戳孔。

translation: v. 刺穿, 刺破, 穿透, 突破, 深深感动
example: Steam the corn until it can easily be pierced with a fork. 把玉米蒸到用叉子可以轻易扎透。

translation: v. 刺穿, 使呆住
example: We were all transfixed by the images of the war. 我们被战争的画面牢牢抓住了。

translation: v. 刺激, 使活动
example: Cooking fumes may activate the alarm. 烹调时的油烟可能会触发警报器。

translation: v. 粗缝, 润以油脂, (在烤肉上)涂油, 狠揍, 大骂
example: Baste the potatoes occasionally. 不时在马铃薯上涂点油。

translation: v. 摧残, 破坏
example: The cemetery was vandalized during the night. 公墓在夜间遭到了破坏。

translation: v. 打(谷), (用棍、鞭等)痛打, 打败, 使逆行, 胜过, 使颠簸, 推敲
example: My poor brother used to get thrashed for all kinds of minor offences. 我那可怜的哥哥过去常常因为各种各样的小错而挨打。

translation: v. 打烙印, 诬蔑
v. 打扰, 折磨, 使狼狈, 使担忧
example: John was embarrassed, but it didn’t faze Mike a bit. 约翰很尴尬，但迈克并没有觉得困窘。

translation: v. 打伤, 挫伤, 撞伤
example: The sports trauma not only damage their health, which contuse the enthusiasm of physical activity, but also effect normal study living, indeed the suffering of mentally and physical. 学生在运动中受了伤，不仅损害健康，挫伤体育活动的积极性，而且影响正常的生活、学习，甚至给学生造成生理和心理上的痛苦。

translation: v. 大量的用, 厚厚地涂
example: If your skin is dry, you have to slather on moisturizer to soften it. 如果你的皮肤干燥，就得多涂些润肤霜让它滋润。

translation: v. 到处搜索, 掠夺, 洗劫
example: The whole flat had been ransacked. 整间公寓都遭到洗劫。

translation: v. 盗用, 挪用
example: Two managers were charged with embezzling $400,000. 两名经理被控挪用了40万美元。

translation: v. 得出, 引出, 抽出, 引起
example: Mr. Norris said he was hopeful that his request would elicit a positive response. 诺里斯先生说他希望他的要求会引起积极的回应。

translation: v. 抵消, 中和, 阻碍
example: They gave him drugs to counteract his withdrawal symptoms. 他们给他服药以消除他的脱瘾症状。

translation: v. 点燃, 使燃烧, 激起(热情等), 挑起(战争等)
v. 点燃, 使着火, 引起, 照亮
example: I came in and kindled a fire in the stove. 我进来把炉子点着了。

translation: v. 定界限, 划界
example: This is not meant to delimit what approaches social researchers can adopt. 这并不是说要划定社会研究者所能够采用方法的界限。

translation: v. 逗弄, 使干着急
example: ...the dreams of democracy that have so tantalized them. …让他们可望而不可及的民主梦想。

translation: v. 断言, 主张
example: In this conflict of emotions all I dare aver is that it has been my faithful study to collect, my duty from a just appreciation of every circumstance by which it might be affected. 怀着这种矛盾心情，我唯一敢断言的是，通过正确估计可能产生影响的各种情况来克尽吾职，乃是我忠贞不渝的努力目标。 我唯一敢祈望的是，如果我在执行这项任务时因陶醉于往事。

translation: v. 断章取义, 混淆
v. 夺取, 掠夺
example: ...people who despoil the countryside. ...掠夺乡村的人。

translation: v. 恶化, 增剧, 激怒, 使加剧, 使烦恼
example: The recession has exacerbated this problem. 经济衰退使这个问题更加严重。

translation: v. 发布, 公布, 传播
example: The shipping industry promulgated a voluntary code. 航运业对自律守则进行了宣传。

translation: v. 发出, 放射, 吐露, 散发, 发表, 发行
example: The kettle emitted a shrill whistle. 水壶发出了刺耳的鸣笛声。

translation: v. 发生, 得知, 使蒸发, 使排出
example: Exactly what transpired remains unknown. 究竟发生了什么一直无人知晓。

translation: v. 发誓放弃, 避免, 公开放弃
example: ...a formal statement abjuring military action. ...一个宣布撤回军事行动的正式声明。

translation: v. 发泄(怒火), 报仇
example: Violent storms wreaked havoc on the French Riviera, leaving three people dead and dozens injured. 强风暴对法国里维埃拉造成严重破坏，致使3人死亡、数十人受伤。

translation: v. 罚款, 惩罚
example: The thing that you touch is too much also, return amerce! 你碰的事情也太多了吧，还罚款呢！

translation: v. 反复地说, 重申, 重做
example: Let me reiterate the most important points. 我来把最重要的几点重申一遍。

translation: v. 反复说, 重申, 重述
v. 防止结冰, 装以除冰装置, 除冰
v. 放大, 扩大, 赞美, 夸大, 夸张
example: At the Sheffield arena, the speakers were magnified ten times on a giant screen. 在谢菲尔德体育馆，演讲者在一个巨大的屏幕上被放大了十倍。

translation: v. 放大, 增强
example: an amplified guitar 带有扩音设备的电吉他

translation: v. 放弃
example: That is what the regime fears most, because then it either has to shoot its own people or cede power. 这是当前伊朗政权最害怕的，因为到那时只能被迫选择开枪射击自己的人们，或放弃权力。

translation: v. 放弃, 抛弃
example: children forsaken by their parents 被父母遗弃的孩子

translation: v. 放弃, 遗弃
example: How could she abandon her own child? 她怎么能抛弃自己的孩子？

translation: v. 放射, 辐射, 传播, 广播
example: Many kinds of woodland can be seen on the various walks which radiate from the Heritage Centre. 从遗产中心向外伸展的各条走道上可以看到多种林地。

translation: v. 诽谤, 辱骂, 贬低, 轻视
example: The agency has been vilified by some doctors for being unnecessarily slow to approve life-saving drugs. 该机构因对救生药物的审批速度过慢而备受一些医生的诽谤。

translation: v. 废除, 取消
example: Both governments voted to abrogate the treaty. 两国政府均投票通过废除这项条约。

translation: v. 分类, 分等
example: We’d classify Drabble’s novels under ‘Romance’. 我们把德拉布尔的小说归类为“言情小说”。

translation: v. 分派, 派遣
example: Goods are normally dispatched within 24 hours. 货物一般在24小时内派送。

translation: v. 吩咐, 命令, 嘱咐, <主美>禁止
example: She enjoined me strictly not to tell anyone else. 她严令我不要告诉其他任何人。

translation: v. 奉承, 谄媚, 奉承
v. 否定, 打消
example: He warned that to negate the results of elections would only make things worse. 他警告说否定选举结果只能使事态更加恶化。

translation: v. 赋予新肉体, 使转生
example: ...their belief that human souls were reincarnated in the bodies of turtles. ...他们认为人的灵魂转世投胎到海龟身体里的信仰。

translation: v. 改头换面地重复
example: He simply rehashed the same story. 他只是把同一个故事改头换面了一下。

translation: v. 给予(尤指抽象事物), 传授, 告知, 透露
example: She had information that she couldn’t wait to impart. 她得到了消息，迫不及待地想告诉别人。

translation: v. 给予, 安放
example: The United States bestowed honorary citizenship upon England's World War II prime minister, Sir Winston Churchill. 美国授予了二战期间的英国首相温斯顿·丘吉尔爵士荣誉公民的称号。

translation: v. 给予选举权, 给予自治权, 解放
example: The company voted to enfranchise its 120 women members. 公司投票决定给予其120名女员工选举权。

translation: v. 更改, 修改
example: The feedback will be used to modify the course for next year. 这些反馈意见将用于修改明年的课程。

translation: v. 公开指责, 公然抨击, 谴责
example: The group denounced the failure by the authorities to take action. 该团体谴责当局没有采取行动。

translation: v. 攻击, 质问
example: Protesters assailed the proposed fare increase. 抗议者们抨击了提价的提议。

translation: v. 构思, 以为, 持有
example: Scientists first conceived the idea of the atomic bomb in the 1930’s. 在20世纪30年代，科学家第一次有了原子弹的设想。

translation: v. 雇用, 用, 使用
example: The factory employs over 2,000 people. 这家工厂雇用了2,000多名员工。

translation: v. 关在栏中, 拘留, 扣押, 没收
example: He sued the police after they impounded his car. 警察扣押他的车后他提起诉讼。

translation: v. 管制, 控制, 调节, 校准
example: strict rules regulating the use of chemicals in food 限制化学品在食物中使用的严格规定

translation: v. 灌溉, 修水利, 冲洗伤口, 使潮湿
example: The water in Lake Powell is used to irrigate the area. 包尔湖的水被用来灌溉该地区。

translation: v. 灌输, 注入, 沏或泡(茶、药等), 浸渍, 鼓舞
example: Many of the girls seemed to be infused with excitement on seeing the snow. 许多女孩子似乎一看到雪心里就充满了兴奋。

translation: v. 归罪于, 归咎于, 归因于
example: It is grossly unfair to impute blame to the United Nations. 把责任归咎于联合国是极不公平的。

translation: v. 过饱, 使厌腻
example: Her sweet submissive smile began to cloy after a while. 不久，她那种甜甜的媚笑开始让人厌烦了。

translation: v. 过度缩减, 克扣
v. 焊接
example: The new handle will have to be welded on. 新的把手得焊上去。

translation: v. 耗尽, 使衰竭
example: ...substances that deplete the ozone layer. …消耗臭氧层的物质。

translation: v. 横断
v. 忽然弹出, 挥动
v. 花费, 消耗, 支出, [海]把(暂时不用的绳)绕在杆上
example: Children expend a lot of energy and may need more high-energy food than adults. 孩子们耗能多，可能比成人需要更多高能量的食物。

translation: v. 画轮廓, 预示
v. 缓和, 减轻, 镇定
example: Nothing could assuage his guilt. 什么都不能减轻他的内疚。

translation: v. 唤起, 引起, 博得
example: The photographs evoked strong memories of our holidays in France. 那些照片勾起了我们到法国度假的深刻回忆。

translation: v. 毁坏
example: The city centre was devastated by the bomb. 市中心被这枚炸弹摧毁了。

translation: v. 毁坏, 破坏, 推翻, 粉碎
example: He demolished my argument in minutes. 他几分钟内就把我的论点驳倒了。

translation: v. 混合, 使微醉, 使咬字不清晰, 鬼混
example: The twins are so alike that it’s easy to muddle them up. 这对双胞胎看上去太像了，很容易弄混。

translation: v. 击, 打, 用拳头连续揍
example: Diane leaned over and pummeled the pillows. 黛安娜俯下身不断捶打枕头。

translation: v. 击退, 抵制, 使厌恶, 使不愉快
example: The smell repelled him. 这气味让他反感。

translation: v. 激动, 煽动
example: They were charged with inciting racial hatred. 他们被指控煽动种族仇恨。

translation: v. 激怒, 使急躁
example: It really irritates me when he doesn’t help around the house. 家里的事情他一点都不帮忙，真让我恼火。

translation: v. 激怒, 挑拨, 煽动, 惹起, 驱使
example: The novel has provoked fierce debate in the US. 那部小说在美国引发了激烈的争论。

translation: v. 嫉妒, 羡慕, 舍不得给
example: I certainly don't begrudge him the Nobel Prize. 我肯定不会妒忌他得了获诺贝尔奖。

translation: v. 记诵, 精读
v. 加苦味于, 使受苦, 使难受, 使怨恨, 加重
v. 假装, 装作, 捏造, <古>想象
example: Feigning a headache, I went upstairs to my room. 我假装头痛，上楼到自己房间去了。

translation: v. 嫁娶, 支持, 赞成
example: She ran away with him to Mexico and espoused the revolutionary cause. 她与他一起逃到了墨西哥，支持革命事业。

translation: v. 检验, 校验, 查证, 核实[计] 打开或关闭文件的读写校验
example: American forces will remain to verify compliance with the treaty. 美军将继续驻留，核查条约是否得到遵守。

translation: v. 减弱, 减少, 抑制
v. 娇养, 溺爱, 放纵
v. 矫正, 调整, [化]精馏
example: I did my best to rectify the situation, but the damage was already done. 我竭尽全力去挽回局面，但损害已经造成了。

translation: v. 教唆, 煽动, 帮助, 支持
example: His wife was sentenced to seven years imprisonment for aiding and abetting him. 他的妻子因与他同谋被判决关押七年。

translation: v. 接吻, 接触
example: And so we would osculate (kiss). 然后，我们接吻。

translation: v. 接种, 嫁接
example: ...a programme to inoculate every child in the country. ...一个给全国每个孩子接种疫苗的计划。

translation: v. 揭穿, 拆穿假面具, 暴露
example: Historian Michael Beschloss debunks a few myths. 历史学家迈克尔·贝斯切罗斯揭露了一些神话的真相。

translation: v. 结束, 熄灭，淬火
example: a desperate bid to quench the raging flames 为扑灭熊熊大火而不顾一切的努力

translation: v. 解放, 释放
v. 解惑, 释疑, 使省悟
example: Their view of country people was that they like to please strangers. I did not disabuse them of this notion. 他们认为乡下人爱讨好外地人。我没有纠正他们的这种想法。

translation: v. 解码, 译解
example: The software decodes the information embedded in the satellite broadcasts. 这种软件能够解读衞星广播中的信息。

translation: v. 解析
example: How would you parse it, then? 那么，如何解析它呢？

translation: v. 尽(力), 施加(压力等), 努力
example: He has exerted himself tirelessly on behalf of the charity. 他为这个慈善组织奋斗不懈。

translation: v. 举止, 贬低身份
example: language that demeans women 侮辱女性的语言

translation: v. 具体表达, 使具体化, 包含, 收录
example: She embodies everything I admire in a teacher. 她具备了我所钦佩的教师该具备的一切素质。

translation: v. 卷入, 吞没, 狼吞虎咽
example: despair so great it threatened to engulf him 几乎要将他压垮的绝望情绪

translation: v. 掘出, 发掘
example: His remains have been exhumed from a cemetery in Queens. 他的遗体已被从昆士郡的一个墓地里挖了出来。

translation: v. 开拓, 开发, 开采, 剥削, 用以自肥

translation: n.  适宜； 才能， 资质
example: He drifted into publishing and discovered an aptitude for working with accounts. 他偶入出版界，发现自己具有管账的天资。

translation: adj.  恶劣的， 卑鄙的， 道德败坏的
example: This coffee tastes really vile. 这咖啡太难喝了。

translation: adj.  不服从的， 违抗的
example: In industry, a worker who is grossly insubordinate is threatened with discharge. 在企业界，拒不服从指令的工人面临被解雇的威胁。

translation: n.  信赖， 信任
example: ...the country's increasing reliance on foreign aid. …这个国家日益依赖外来援助。

translation: v.  啃， 咬； 腐蚀， 侵蚀

translation: v. 缓期执行；暂时解救；n.  缓刑， 暂缓

translation: v.  加重， 恶化； 激怒， 使恼火
example: Their money problems were further aggravated by a rise in interest rates. 由于利率上调，他们的财务问题更加严重。

translation: n.  喷出， 迸发
example: A spurt of diesel came from one valve and none from the other. 一股股柴油从一个阀门喷涌而出，但另一个没有。

translation: adj. 乏味的；懦弱的；n.  懦弱的人
example: For some people soccer has a reputation as a rather namby-pamby sport. 对有些人来说，足球是一项有点婆婆妈妈的运动。

translation: adv.  暂时地； 片刻， 立刻

translation: n.  拒绝， 摈弃

translation: adj.  巨大的， 庞大的

translation: v.  删除， 删改

translation: n.  暴政， 专制统治； 暴行

translation: adj.  长篇的； 大量的

example: a shirt autographed by the whole team 一件有全体队员签名的衬衫

translation: adj.  慈善的， 博爱的

example: In view of the above, the transformation properties of astigmatic elliptic Gaussian beams are analysed overall, the exact formulas of correcting astigmatism and rotary symmetrize transformation. 分析像散椭圆高斯光束的传输变换特性，推导出半导体激光束的像散校正与旋转对称化变换公式。

translation: n.  无礼， 傲慢 '

example: Your thesis is short for the accurate ratiocination to suppose your argument. 你的论文缺少能证明你的论点的正确推理。

translation: adj. 无所事事的；无效的；v.  懒散， 无所事事
example: 4,000 workers have been idle for 12 of the first 27 weeks of this year. 4千名工人在今年最初的27个星期中有12个星期无事可干。

translation: n.  错误； 【地质】断层
example: the San Andreas fault 圣安德烈亚斯断层

translation: v. 相互影响；n.  相互影响
example: The law bring into effect is an organism concerned with the interplay among society, economic and culture. 实际运作中的法律制度是一个社会、经济和文化互相作用的有机体。

translation: adj.  芳香的； 温和的； 止痛的
example: a balmy summer night 一个宜人的夏夜

translation: adj.  快乐的， 无忧无虑的
example: a blithe disregard for the facts 对事实的漠视

translation: adj.  不连贯的； 语无伦次的
example: Ben, drunk and incoherent, slumped in a chair. 本醉得语无伦次，一屁股跌坐在一把椅子上。

translation: adj.  被动的， 缺乏活力的
example: Kathy seems to take a very passive role in the relationship. 凯茜在这一关系中似乎扮演着十分被动的角色。

translation: n.  功效， 有效性
example: Recent medical studies confirm the efficacy of a healthier lifestyle. 近来的医学研究证实了更健康的生活方式的功效。

translation: v.  召唤， 示意
example: I could see my husband beckoning me. 我看到我丈夫在向我招手。

translation: n.  季风； 雨季
example: ...the end of the monsoon. …雨季的结束。

translation: n.  碎片； 片段
example: glass fragments 玻璃碎片

translation: v.  急速跳动
example: He felt suddenly faint, and his heart began to palpitate. 他突然感到晕厥，心脏也开始悸动。

translation: adj.  响应的， 做出反应的； 敏感的， 反应快的
example: a car with highly responsive steering 方向盘操纵灵活的汽车

translation: adj.  遗忘的， 忘却的； 疏忽的
adj.  地形学的
example: Experts can combine pictures taken from airplanes and satellites with topographical data. 专家们能把航空和卫星照片与地形数据结合起来。 。

translation: n.  类别， 范畴
example: people in the over-45 age category 属45岁以上年龄组的人

translation: v.  竞争， 与…匹敌；n. 竞争者，对手
example: The college’s facilities rival those of Harvard and Yale. 这所学院的设施比得上哈佛和耶鲁。
